title: Video Editor (VSL + Short-Form Ads)
description:
Contract | Remote | $30-35 per video | Growth + Bonus Opportunities



We’re looking for a skilled and reliable video editor to join our remote creative team and help us produce high-performing direct-response VSLs that blend storytelling, smart pacing, and scroll-stopping visuals.



These are 1–2-minute videos combining AI voiceovers, real-world footage, and TikTok-style B-roll to deliver emotional, authentic stories that convert.



You’ll be provided with everything you need — script, voiceover, direction, and examples — your job is to bring it to life through pacing, visuals, and clean editing.



???? What You’ll Be Doing



Editing up to 6 VSLs per week (bonus pay available for extra volume)



Using CapCut for editing (or similar tools)



Matching visuals, pacing, and music to scripted AI voiceovers



Pulling B-roll from Canva Pro, stock footage, or TikTok-style clips



Delivering emotional, polished, and conversion-focused edits



???? What We Provide



Fully written scripts + recorded voiceovers



Brand assets and creative direction



Reference videos + editing tutorials



Organized folders for each project



Friendly, responsive feedback — we love editors who want to grow



???? Pay & Bonuses



$30-35 per video, depending on skill and experience



Bonus pay for taking on additional projects (up to 15 total)



Room to grow into long-term creative roles (direction, scripting, ideation, etc.)



???? What We’re Looking For



Strong skills in CapCut, Canva Pro, and TikTok-style editing



Fast turnaround and clean file delivery



Attention to detail — syncing visuals to emotion and script



Marketing instincts — you understand story, pacing, and engagement



Ability to follow brand direction and take feedback well



Bonus: experience editing UGC, eCommerce, or VSLs



???? Why Work With Us



We’re a fast-moving team building digital brands rooted in storytelling, quality, and performance. We value creativity, communication, and consistency — and we reward editors who bring passion and precision to their work.

We believe in fair pay, clear expectations, and long-term growth for people who deliver and want to keep improving.



If you want to join a small but driven team where your creative input truly matters, we’d love to hear from you.



???? To Apply



Please send:



A short intro message



Your portfolio (VSLs, TikTok-style edits, UGC welcome)



Your rate per video



How many videos per week you’re comfortable starting with



Looking forward to working with you.

title: v\High-Ticket Appointment Setter (DM + Phone) – Credit & Business Funding. OTE $20k - $27k annually
description:
High-Ticket Appointment Setter (DM + Phone) – Credit & Business Funding



We are a fast-growing funding company helping professionals secure $50K–$250K+ in business funding.



We are looking for a serious appointment setter who can handle both:



• Instagram / DM conversations

• SMS follow-ups

• Outbound & inbound phone calls



This is not a beginner role.

You must have experience setting for high-ticket offers ($3K–$10K+).



?

Pay structure





• $1,500 program

• $7/hr base (40 hrs)

• $20 per showed qualified set

• $30 per closed set

• Revenue bonus

• Show rate bonus

?



Mission For Infinite Funding Enrollment Specialist



Option #1 - $1,500



To drive $270,000+ in new business revenue annually by generating conversations with NEW potential clients (lead generation) and recouping and re-setting leads who didn’t initially close (follow-up).



?



Outcomes / KPIs



22,500 in NEW business revenue monthly (minimum).

15 closed sets of our Funding 
 price point.

Generate 60–80 calls per month (approx 3–5 per day) through DM inbound & outbound calls, Skool group marketing methods.

25% minimum “live call” closing ratio.

70% minimum show rate (80% target).

Daily execution of team & administrative tasks.

Morning Huddles via Zoom, 9am Monday – Friday.

End of Day report.

Update projections, tracking sheets, and CRM daily.



?



Compensation



Base



$7 per hour × 40 hours per week = $1,120 per month



?



Commission



$20 per showed qualified set

$30 per closed set



?



Revenue Bonus



$500 bonus at $20,000 cash collected

$1,000 bonus at $30,000 cash collected



?



Show Rate Bonus



$500 monthly bonus if show rate reaches 80%+



Conditions:

Minimum 60 booked calls in the month

Must meet qualification scorecard standards



?



Expected Earnings (Baseline – 25% Close Rate)



60 booked calls

70% show rate = 42 showed calls

25% close rate = 11 closed sets



Revenue Generated:

11 × $1,500 = $16,500



Monthly Earnings:



Base = $1,120

42 shows × $20 = $840

11 closes × $30 = $330



Total = $2,290 per month

Annual = $27,480



(No bonus triggered at this level)



?



Strong Performance (30% Close Rate)



60 booked

42 shows

13 closes



Revenue = $19,500



Monthly Earnings:



Base = $1,120

Show = $840

Close = $390



Total = $2,350 per month



?



High Performance (45% Close Rate + 80% Show Rate)



80 booked

80% show rate = 64 shows

45% close rate = 29 closes



Revenue Generated:

29 × $1,500 = $43,500



Monthly Earnings:



Base = $1,120

64 shows × $20 = $1,280

29 closes × $30 = $870

Revenue bonus (30k+) = $1,000

Show rate bonus (80%+) = $500



Total = $4,770 per month

Annual = $57,240



?



Time



This is a full-time, 40 hours per week position.

Flexible schedule, provided you generate 60–80 set calls monthly.

Must be available on Slack 8am–6pm MST daily.

Remote position.





Your Responsibilities



• 100+ outbound touches per day (DM + SMS + Call)

• Qualify leads properly before booking

• Maintain 70%+ show rate

• Log all activity inside GHL (GoHighLevel)

• Follow up relentlessly



You are not just booking calls.

You are protecting our closers’ time by booking qualified prospects only.



?



Minimum Requirements



• 2+ years high-ticket setting experience

• Proven track record of revenue generated

• Experience with financial, credit, or business opportunity offers preferred

• Comfortable discussing income, credit score, and investment capacity

• Fluent English (spoken + written)

• CRM experience (GHL preferred)



?



KPIs



• 3–5 qualified booked calls per day

• 70–80% show rate

• Clean notes and proper pre-frame before closer call



Low-quality bookings will not be tolerated.



?



Compensation



Base hourly + performance bonus:



• Per show bonus

• Per closed deal bonus

• Long-term growth for top performers



Comp will scale with performance.



?



To Apply



Reply with:

1. The highest monthly revenue your sets helped generate

2. Average daily outbound volume

3. Average show rate

4. A short Loom explaining your qualification process

5. Your availability (timezone + hours)



Applications without numbers will not be considered.



?



If you are competitive, disciplined, and serious about performance — apply.



We move fast.

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
We are seeking a skilled Video Editor specializing in short-form content creation and social media retention. Your primary role will be to create engaging and compelling videos for professional speakers that captivate audiences across various web and social media platforms. You should have a solid understanding of graphic animation and rotoscoping techniques.

At SpeakerVideos, simply adding subtitles is not enough, we are looking for editors who go beyond by creatively using graphic animation, B-roll, and rotoscoping to enhance storytelling.



Please share your three best edited videos when applying. Attention to detail and a proactive mindset in approaching both creative challenges and routine tasks are essential.



Key Responsibilities:

? Editing and Assembling Footage: Cut, splice, and edit raw footage into cohesive and engaging short-form videos that align with the project's vision and goals.

? Music Selection and Sound Design: Select appropriate soundtracks and sound effects, and perform audio mixing to enhance the viewer experience. A strong understanding of music is essential.

? Color Grading and Correction: Adjust and enhance color settings to ensure visual consistency and appeal.

? Graphics and Special Effects: Incorporate motion graphics and special effects to enhance storytelling.

? Collaboration: Work closely with directors, producers, and creative teams to ensure a unified vision.

? Timely Delivery: Manage multiple projects, ensuring deadlines are consistently met without compromising quality.

? Quality Control: Review edits thoroughly, incorporate feedback, and make necessary revisions to achieve the desired outcome.

? Industry Awareness: Stay updated on video editing trends, techniques, and software.



Experience Required

? Proven experience as a Video Editor with a strong portfolio showcasing short-form video work.

? Expertise in video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut Pro (PC), Adobe After Effects, or similar tools.

? Strong creative flair with an excellent eye for detail and storytelling.

? Effective teamwork and communication skills, with experience working collaboratively in remote teams.

? Strong time management skills and the ability to handle multiple projects in a fast-paced environment.

? Adaptability to client feedback and changing project requirements.



How We Will Help You Succeed

? Supportive Environment: A collaborative culture that provides constructive feedback to help you grow and excel.

? Professional Development: Opportunities for training and upskilling in the latest video editing techniques and tools.

? Cutting-Edge Tools: Access to premium editing resources such as Submagic, Envato Elements, and other industry-standard software.

? Regular Feedback: Constructive performance evaluations to support your professional growth.

title: Costumer service agent
description:
About us

E-com Rens is a fast-growing fashion dropshipping business that has successfully run multiple six-figure Shopify stores. We serve customers worldwide and are now expanding our team. We are looking for a committed, reliable customer service representative who is ready to grow with us long term. We move fast, we care about our customers, and we expect the same from everyone on our team.



Role overview

You will be responsible for managing customer communication across our store. Every customer must receive a timely, professional, and helpful response. You will handle order management, issue resolution, and coordination with our suppliers. This is a part-time role with consistent daily work. We are looking for someone who takes full ownership of customer satisfaction and treats this role seriously.



Responsibilities

Respond to customer
s within 4 hours, 7 days a week

Handle order edits, tracking questions, cancellations, and refunds through Shopify

Communicate clearly and respectfully with every customer

Apply company refund policies accurately (e.g. 15%, 30%, 50% partial refunds)

Keep all records up to date in Google Sheets

Coordinate with suppliers on order-related issues such as delays, stock problems, and shipping

Follow SOPs, stay organised, and work independently without needing constant supervision

Requirements

Minimum 1 year of customer service experience for a Shopify dropshipping store — fashion niche is a strong plus

Fluent in written English with strong grammar and a customer-first tone

Available 7 days a week — consistent daily availability is required

Highly responsive and reliable — proactive communication is expected

Familiarity with Google Sheets; experience with Freshdesk or similar helpdesk tools is a plus

Strong attention to detail and willingness to follow instructions carefully

Able to problem-solve independently and escalate only when truly needed

Compensation

$3

per hour · Part-time

How to apply

Answer the following questions in your application:



Do you have experience in customer service for dropshipping stores?

Are you experienced with Freshdesk or similar helpdesk tools?

Can you work part-time, 7 days a week?

Please share links to 2 Shopify stores you have worked with in a customer support role (inactive stores are fine).

How fast do you typically respond when your manager sends you a message?

Also include your CV/resume and any examples of customer service work you have done — screenshots, templates, etc. Optional: share links to your professional profiles or past online projects.



Please make sure to include your phone number or
 address in your application. This is how we will contact you if you are selected — applications without contact details will not be followed up on.



To confirm you have read the full job post, please include the hashtag #CSrole26 somewhere in your application. Applications without this hashtag will not be considered.



We are hiring immediately.



Only serious applicants who can fully commit should apply. Thank you for your interest in joining E-com Rens!

title: U.S. Real Estate Title & Escrow Coordinator (Experienced Only)
description:
Description:



We are a U.S.-based land investment company looking for a highly experienced Title & Escrow Coordinator to manage transactions from contract to closing.



This is not an entry-level VA role. You must already understand U.S. real estate title, escrow, and closing processes.



Responsibilities:



Draft and review real estate documents (deeds, corrective deeds, affidavits, etc.) from templates

Review title commitments and identify issues (liens, easements, exceptions)

Open and manage escrows with title companies and attorneys

Coordinate with buyers, sellers, and third parties to ensure smooth closings

Proactively follow up and keep transactions moving to close on time

Assist in resolving title issues or sourcing the right professionals when needed

Maintain accurate tracking of all deals and timelines



Requirements (do not apply unless you meet these):



Direct experience with U.S. title, escrow, or real estate closings

Ability to read and understand title commitments without training

Experience working with title companies, attorneys, or mortgage/closing teams

Strong organizational and follow-up skills (you don’t let things fall through the cracks)

Excellent written and spoken English

Detail-oriented and highly reliable



Preferred:



Experience with land transactions or investor-driven deals

Background in title company, escrow, or mortgage processing



Compensation:

We pay above market for the right person. This is a long-term role with growth potential.



To Apply (required):

Answer the following clearly and concisely:



1) Describe your direct experience with U.S. title and escrow work

2) Walk through how you review a title commitment and what you look for

3) Give an example of a title issue you encountered and how it was resolved

4) What is the difference between a warranty deed and a quitclaim deed?



Applications that do not answer these questions will not be considered.

Hi Johnny! (Said as if you’re great friends. Pause.) It’s [AGENT NAME]. Probably caught you at a bad time?

title: Performance Marketing Manager
description:

We are not building just another brokerage.



We are building a scalable real estate platform designed to modernize how homes are bought and sold — through systems, technology, disciplined execution, and long-term vision.



Our ambition is not incremental growth.

It is structured, North American scale.



And we are intentionally building a high-caliber team aligned with that mission.



If you are driven by measurable impact.

If you believe performance marketing should compound over time.

If you want to build infrastructure, not just campaigns.

--------------------------------------------------------------

You are expected to be the internal expert for marketing matters — the person leadership turns to for strategic insight, innovative ideas, and informed recommendations.



--------------------------------------------------------------

• Write high-converting direct-response copy

You must have proven, hands-on experience managing significant ad budgets.

)

• Increase conversion rates through structured experimentation

• Refine messaging clarity and CTA effectiveness

• Improve user journey and reduce friction

Future scope may include additional landing pages and funnel expansion as we scale.

 nurture systems

• Segment and organize both new and existing leads

• Implement disciplined tagging and CRM organization

• Improve engagement and conversion rates

• Maintain clean, scalable list architecture

Analytics, Tracking & Attribution

Marketing Leadership & Innovation

• Stay current with emerging trends, tools, platforms, and advertising strategies

• Evaluate new opportunities and recommend adoption when appropriate

• Serve as the internal authority on paid growth and performance marketing

• Guide leadership decisions with data and informed insight



You are not just executing campaigns.



You are setting direction.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Who You Are:



You are driven by growth, ownership, and long-term impact.

• Proven, hands-on experience managing large Meta Ads budgets

• Deep understanding of direct-response marketing and buyer psychology

• Ability to independently plan creative angles and performance strategy

• Strong copywriting and positioning skills

• Comfortable producing ad creatives when required

• Strong analytical thinking and disciplined testing mindset

• Structured in documentation and optimization

• Accountable for measurable outcomes

• Continuously learning and staying ahead of platform changes and trends



Highly Ideal:

• Real estate marketing experience

• Experience promoting brokerages to attract agents

• Experience generating buyer and seller leads

• Understanding how to position real estate services competitively



Requirements:

• Demonstrated success managing large Meta Ads budgets

• Strong landing page optimization experience

• Advanced analytics and tracking knowledge

• Experience using HubSpot for segmentation and
 marketing

• Experience implementing structured A/B testing systems

• Reliable remote setup



Bonus If You Have:

• SEO experience

• Google Ads experience

• AI tools and automation knowledge

• Zapier or workflow automation experience

• Advanced CRM tagging and list organization skills



--------------------------------------------------------------



What We Offer:

• A long-term opportunity inside a scaling North American proptech platform

• Direct collaboration with founders

• Meaningful ownership of paid acquisition performance

• The opportunity to architect and refine the company’s growth engine

• Clear path toward future Head of Marketing

• Real influence on continental expansion



We are building a team designed to scale.



The platform is expanding.

The systems are strengthening.

The ambition is long-term.



We are looking for someone who sees themselves not just as a marketing manager — but as the growth leader who helps steer the direction of a North American real estate platform.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply

Subject Line: Performance Marketing Manager – Your Name



NOTE: Failure to follow the application instructions exactly will result in disqualification. Attention to detail matters, and the application process reflects the level of discipline we value.



If you are ready to take the helm of our growth engine and help build the future of real estate in North America, we want to hear from you.

title: Senior Google Ads Specialist
description:
*Senior PPC Manager*



About Us

We are Matt & Markus - Two experienced Online Marketing Experts with a combined 20+ years of PPC experience. We specialize in running high performing Google Ads campaigns. Additionally, we support clients with in depth data analysis and conversion optimization. 



We have been working independently as freelancers for many years and teamed up to build and grow our Google Ads agency in 2025. The agency is growing and with that growth we are building a strong team to be part of the journey.



About the Role

We are a growing performance marketing agency focused on delivering data-driven PPC campaigns for international clients. Our main expertise lies within Google Ads.

We are looking for a Senior PPC Manager with several (4+) years of experience with Google Ads to take ownership of our PPC accounts, drive growth, and operate with a high level of independence.

You will work closely with the founders while also owning execution, strategy, and performance across accounts.



Key Responsibilities

- Account Ownership & Performance

- Manage PPC accounts end-to-end across Google Ads (Search, Performance Max, Display, YouTube)

- Take full ownership of results (scaling volume, improving performance, driving growth)

- Identify and act on opportunities without needing constant direction

- Scaling & Strategy

- Scale campaigns efficiently while maintaining performance targets

- Allocate budgets based on performance trends and growth opportunities

- Build and refine account structures to support long-term scaling

- Data, Tracking & Insights



Work confidently with:

- GA4 (setup, analysis, debugging)

- Google Tag Manager (tracking setup, event tracking)

- Offline Conversion Tracking (OCT)

- Looker Studio dashboards (build and interpret)

- Turn data into clear, actionable insights that drive decisions



Testing & Optimisation

- Run structured testing plans (ads, bidding strategies, landing pages)

- Continuously improve CVR, CTR, and overall account efficiency

- Identify performance issues early and resolve them proactively



Client Communication

- Communicate directly with clients in a clear and confident manner

- Present performance updates and explain strategy in simple terms

- Build trust through ownership and results



Mentorship

- Support and mentor junior tea
mbers when needed

- Share knowledge and best practices to improve team performance



What We’re Looking For



Experience

- 4+ years hands-on PPC experience (primarily Google Ads)

- Agency or client-side experience required

- Proven ability to scale campaigns and drive growth

- Experience managing multiple accounts independently



Technical Skills

- Strong expertise in Google Ads.

- Solid understanding of:

- GA4 + GTM

- Conversion tracking and attribution

- Offline conversions

- Looker Studio



Mindset

- Highly proactive and accountable

- Strong problem solver who figures things out independently

- Commercially aware (focus on business outcomes, not just metrics)

- Comfortable making decisions without constant guidance



Important (Read Carefully)



We value:

- Ownership (and being able to take responsibility for wins and mistakes)

- Critical thinking (and being able to say “I see it different”)

- Clear communication when something is unclear (and being able to say “I don’t know”)

- Someone who enjoys life and is generally positive and can laugh while delivering high quality work



We are not looking for someone who:

- Relies heavily on AI tools without understanding the work

- Says they understand but does not ask questions when unsure





Working Setup

- Remote (Philippines-based)

- Results are more important than a work schedule

- Small, high-performance team

- Focus on results, not micromanagement



Salary

Based on experience



What Success Looks Like

- Accounts are scaling in volume and revenue

- Performance opportunities are identified and acted on proactively

- Minimal hand-holding required



How to Apply



Please include:

- Your CV

- Written Summary of your PPC experience and where you see your personal strength

- Examples of accounts you’ve scaled (include results)

- Tools and platforms you’ve used

- Any other online marketing experience



We are looking forward to receive your application and to get to know you.



Best wishes,

Markus and Matt

title: Reddit Operations Manager
description:
Reddit Operations Manager (Full-Time, Remote)



We’re hiring a Reddit Operations Manager to take full ownership of our Reddit growth engine.



This is a leadership role. You will run the operation, manage the team, and be directly responsible for performance. If you’re not comfortable owning results, this role isn’t for you.



What You’ll Do



* Lead and manage a team of Reddit VAs and account farmers

* Oversee daily Reddit operations across multiple accounts

* Ensure accounts are properly built, maintained, and scaled

* Replace banned accounts immediately and maintain continuity

* Create and optimize posting strategies and content plans

* Analyze performance daily and continuously improve results

* Run A/B tests to increase engagement and conversions

* Research new subreddits, trends, and growth opportunities

* Prepare weekly reports and strategic recommendations for the CEO

* Create structured content request plans for weekly approval

* Monitor team productivity using tracking software (Insightful)

* Enforce accountability, efficiency, and output across the team





What We’re Looking For



* Proven, hands-on Reddit experience (non-negotiable)

* Strong understanding of account growth, behavior, and ban avoidance

* Ability to manage people and maintain high standards

* Analytical, data-driven thinker

* Proactive, disciplined, and execution-focused

* Comfortable making decisions and taking ownership





Compensation



* Fixed base (paid biweekly)

* Performance-based bonus (biweekly)

* Your income scales directly with the results you deliver



Important



This role requires daily involvement, attention to detail, and constant optimization. Performance is reviewed weekly.



If you’re looking for something easy or low-responsibility, this is not for you.





How to Apply



Apply via our Airtable form:

title: Claude Code and OpenClaw Teacher
description:
I'm looking for a genuinely expert-level tutor to accelerate my learning in Claude Code and OpenClaw. I pick things up fast and my goal is to reach an advanced level quickly — so I need someone who is already there.



Sessions will be 1-on-1 via video call, focused and practical.



What you'll be teaching:

• Claude Code – advanced agentic workflows, prompt engineering, CI/CD integration, best practices at scale

• OpenClaw – deep configuration, advanced automation, security hardening, real-world deployments

• GitHub – branching strategies, pull requests, Actions, version control best practices

• Automation tools – n8n, Zapier, Make, shell scripting, or similar (the more the better)



What I'm looking for:

• Demonstrably expert-level knowledge of Claude Code, OpenClaw, and GitHub — not just familiarity

• Hands-on experience with automation tools and AI-driven development workflows

• Able to move fast, go deep, and push me beyond the basics

• Strong portfolio of advanced projects to draw from during teaching

• Reliable internet and availability for regular scheduled sessions

• Excellent English communication skills



Please do not apply if you are self-taught at a basic level only — I need someone operating at a professional or expert standard.



???? Engagement & Pricing

I'm looking to start with a 2-week course at 6 hours per week (12 hours total), with strong potential to extend for a further 2 weeks or more depending on progress. Please include your quote for the initial 2-week engagement in your application.



To apply, send a message outlining your experience with each of these tools, examples of advanced work you've done, your availability, and your quote for the 2-week course. Links to GitHub profiles or project demos are a big plus.



Let's build something great.

title: Client Specialist Legal Assistant
description:
Client Specialist Legal Assistant

Our law office is looking for a full-time Client Specialist for a busy law practice. The Client Specialist is the first point of contact for our office and  will focus exclusively on landlord-tenant matters. The primary role of this position includes the following:



1. Answering office phones, scheduling client phone calls with attorney and paralegal, and talking with potential clients to qualify them for legal service offerings, and scheduling phone calls with legal staff. Summarize voi
s and routing messages to staff members on the team. 



2. Qualifying potential clients (landlords, property managers, owners of property) for eviction and legal advice over the phone, reviewing online intake submissions and on social media.



3. Presenting and explaining Legal Service Offerings over the phone with potential clients that we can assist.  



4. Following up with Potential clients on online platforms such as TikTok,
 and YouTube 



5. Assist attorney and paralegal by reviewing client intakes for completeness of questions, verifying and clarifying discrepancies in information submitted by clients, and following up with clients for information needed to process client cases.



6. Save and organize client photos, videos, and documents in client case files. 



7. Follow up with our legal partners (process servers, Superior Courts, Sheriff Departments, etc.) for documents and information they need to complete. 





8. Assist attorney and paralegal staff by e-filing court pleadings and documents with Superior Courts that our office practices in. 



9. Send client billings and invoices, and assist attorney and paralegal with collecting client payments, making deposits, and entering deposit transactions into client ledgers or trust accounts.



10. Manage automated client updates and reminders (via Active Campaign). 



Skills and Position Requirements:

• Confidence communicating in  perfect English over the phone and in writing (not negotiable). You will be the first point person of contact on the phone during business hours (Monday through Friday 9:00 a.m.?5:00 p.m. (Pacific Time).  

• Pride in work

• Ability to show up for work on time and ready to work as agreed

• Ability to work as a team in a virtual environment

• Ability to follow directions and attention to detail (a must)

• Ability to maintain attorney-client confidentiality with case matters

• Reliable personal high-speed Internet and your own computer 

• Basic understanding or a willingness to learn within 30 days landlord-tenant terminology such as landlord, tenant, plaintiff, defendant, lease/rental agreement, monthly rent, month-to-month rental agreement, one-year lease, and the basic steps of an eviction 

• Ability to work with formatting of legal documents in Microsoft Word and Adobe Acrobat



Our firm is looking for a person who can be part of our growing legal team to provide the best legal services possible. No legal or law firm experience is necessary.  Major plus if you have experience working in a US Base Landlord-Tenant Law Firm, Have Sales Experience, and/or confidently speak perfect English.  We will train the right person. It is important that you can talk confidently on the phone in perfect English, take pride in your work, and have great attention to detail. 

Instructions on how to apply for this position: 



To be considered for this position, please
  
 and follow these instructions



1. In your
’s subject line, please type in all caps “ACE ATTORNEY SALES.” 



2. MANDATORY TO BE CONSIDERED: To be considered for the position we need you to record a video and answer the following questions down below. In the video, record yourself answering in English the following questions. The purpose of the video is to evaluate your English and presentation skills. Please provide the link to your video in your
 to 
   



3. If you wish to send a resume, please attached it as a PDF to your
 submission 



Questions to answer in your Video submission: 



Question 1. Have you worked for a lawyer, law firm, or legal department, or performed work that requires attention to detail? If yes please explain? 



Question 2: This position is anticipated to be a 40 hour work week position that will require you to have high-speed Internet and a work station with at least two monitors. Working hours will be Monday-Friday from 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. Pacific Time. Would this type of work situation be ideal for you? 



Question 3. Have you worked as a virtual assistant and/or performed work remotely? Do you have experience explaining legal service offerings to potential clients? If so, please describe your experience. 



Question 4. Is there anything else you would like us to know about you?

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
ROSE INJECTABLES — Virtual Assistant (Video Editing + Operations)

Part-Time | Remote | Long-Term | Start Immediately



WHO WE ARE

Rose Injectables is a physician-led women’s health and aesthetic boutique in Colorado Springs and Cañon City, CO. 



Founded by Dr. Liz Rose Knies, M.D. — board-certified physician and aesthetics specialist — we are more than a medspa. 



We serve women from 16+ states, hold a 5.0 Google rating with 425+ reviews, and have trained 5,000+ providers nationwide. We are growing fast and need a sharp, reliable VA to grow with us.



OUR 2026 STANDARD: CONSISTENCY. 



We need someone who executes the same high standard perfectly, every time.



THE ROLE — HOW IT GROWS

This is a long-term position that starts with one responsibility and expands as you prove your skills.



PHASE 1 (Start): Video Content Editing

• Edit short-form Instagram Reels from raw 4K iPhone footage per our Brand Playbook

• Use Meta Reels Editor (preferred) or CapCut Pro

• Apply our 5-Part Video Structure with on-screen hook word overlays

• Generate, proofread, and burn in closed captions — brand fonts and colors only

• Write Instagram captions in brand voice with correct hashtags and landing page links

• Submit via Slack and Dropbox — detailed playbook provided

• KPI: 0–1 revisions per video. Bonus affected by 2+ revisions.



PHASE 2 (Added after Phase 1 mastered):
 Management

• Manage Dr. Liz’s
 using our GPS category system (!1Liz ? 8Delete)

• Draft professional responses on behalf of Dr. Liz — correct English required

• Flag critical
s immediately; manage travel and event calendar updates across Zenoti, Cozi, and gmail calendars

• Notify tea
mbers of schedule changes



PHASE 3 (Added after Phase 2 mastered): Outreach & Lead Support

• Follow up with new patient leads via
 and Jotform — warm, professional English

• Support appointment booking via Zenoti

• Assist with 2x/month newsletter production and content calendar maintenance

• Report weekly on leads, consultations, and conversions



REQUIREMENTS — NON-NEGOTIABLE

-Excellent written and spoken English — you will write for our brand and communicate with real patients

-Reliable high-speed internet on home computer-not cell phone (include a Speedtest screenshot with your application)

- Full dedication during your Rose Injectables hours — no other clients simultaneously

-Willingness to follow a detailed playbook exactly

- Honest communication — ask before you guess



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Portfolio of short-form video edits (Reels, TikTok, or similar)

• Experience managing an executive’s
 inbox

• Health, wellness, beauty, or medical aesthetic experience a plus

• Familiarity with Meta Business Suite / Instagram best practices



TOOLS YOU WILL USE

Meta Reels Editor, CapCut Pro, Canva, Slack,, Dropbox, Zenoti, Jotform, HeyOrca, Gmail, SCALE CRM 



HOURS & PAY

• Start: 10–15 hours per week, growing to 20+ as phases expand

• Base rate + bonus/commission tied to KPIs

• Rate increases with each phase progression. Pay is bi-monthly. 

• Long-term position — we invest in people who invest in us



HOW TO APPLY



Respond here

Subject: VA Application — [Your Name] — Video Editing

Include:

 1. Resume or work history summary

 2. 2–3 short-form video editing samples (Reels or TikTok)

 3. English writing sample: In 2–3 paragraphs, describe a content or social media project you worked on — the goal, what you did, and the result

 4. Brief video introduction (max 2 minutes): Who you are, why you want to work with a women’s health brand, and what you know about Rose Injectables

 5. Speedtest.net screenshot

 6. Hours available per week and your time zone



Applications without a video sample and writing sample will not be reviewed. 



Shortlisted applicants will receive a paid skills test — a real edit using our brand playbook.

 management and correspondence

Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

Important Notes:

This is a direct-hire position (no agencies please)

We're excited to find someone who can truly partner with us in growing our business. If you're sharp, organized, and ready to make a real impact, we want to hear from you!



Please note: We value quality over quantity. Take time to craft a thoughtful application that shows us why you're the perfect fit for this role.

title: Coloring Book Refinement Illustrator
description:
About the Project

We want to produce a series of easy, simple coloring books for adults. We use AI tools to generate initial concept compositions, and a human illustrator refines, redraws, and perfects each page into clean, print-ready line art. You are the the person who transforms rough AI concepts into polished, consistent, coloring-optimized illustrations that feel hand-drawn and warm.

This is an ongoing relationship. The right illustrator becomes our long-term creative partner.

Scope of Work

    • Receive 50 AI-generated concept images as compositional references (labeled "REFERENCE ONLY — NOT FINAL ART") 

    • Redraw, refine, or trace each page into clean, consistent line art following our Brand Style Guide 

    • Ensure all pages meet our technical specifications (line weight, zone count, print requirements) 

    • Create 3–5 original illustrations per book for key pages (cover centerpiece, opening page, signature scenes) where AI concepts are inadequate 

    • Deliver 50 final pages + 1 cover illustration as individual high-resolution files 

    • Complete revisions per page based on our feedback 

Required Qualifications

    • Portfolio demonstrating clean line art illustration (coloring book samples strongly preferred) 

    • Experience with print specifications (300 DPI, bleed settings, black & white interiors) 

    • Proficiency with digital illustration tools (Adobe Illustrator, Procreate, Clip Studio Paint, or equivalent) 

    • Ability to maintain consistent style across 50+ pages within a single book and across a multi-book series 

    • Comfortable working from AI-generated reference images (we will discuss this upfront, if you are philosophically opposed to working with AI references, this is not the right fit) 

    • Responsive communication — replies within 24 hours on business days 



Preferred Qualifications

    • Previously published coloring books 

    • Experience with the "Bold & Easy" coloring book style specifically 

    • Understanding of coloring ergonomics (zone sizing, line closure, marker-friendly design) 

    • Ability to deliver vector files (SVG/AI) in addition to PNG for future scalability 

How to Apply

Please provide:

    1. A link to your portfolio showing coloring book or clean line art work 

    2. Your per-page rate for refinement work and original illustrations 

    3. Your availability and estimated turnaround time for 50 pages 

    4. Confirmation that you are willing to sign a Work-for-Hire Agreement transferring full copyright to our company 

    5. (Optional) A brief note on your experience working from reference images





Thank you

title: Ad Creative Specialist
description:
Job description - Ad Creative Specialist



Our e-commerce company is hiring! We are looking for a full-time E-Commerce Ad Creative specialist to join our team, someone with a thorough understanding of Dropshipping through Shopify and paid advertising. You will make sure that our ad creatives are optimized for conversions and match our product description and quality.



What does an Ad Creative VA do?

An ad creative VA is mainly responsible for creating Advertising creatives for social media advertising. This involves product photo and video editing. This may also involve helping to improve older listings to maximize sales. Marketing skills are required!



Responsibilities and Duties

* Creating new ad creatives for our dropshipping products: in Danish and Swedish.

* Swipe ad creatives from competitors

* Implement Direct Response Marketing strategies to convert visitors into customers.

* Design eye-catching advertisements for social media platforms,
 marketing, and website banners.

* Create and edit product photos to enhance their appeal and showcase features effectively.

* Stay updated on industry trends and best practices in digital advertising and design.

* Accurately compare the products with the ones from our website.

* Collaborate with the marketing team and product listers

* Reviewing marketing materials, websites and presentations to ensure compliance with the regulations of the advertising platforms

Qualifications and Skills



* Proven experience in creating ad creatives.

* Experience with AI is a MUST.

* Proficiency in graphic design software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) Canva etc. Software that I use myself: Elevenlabs and Clipchamp. But if you prefer to use other software, that would also be fine.

* Strong understanding of digital marketing principles and techniques.

* Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.

* Detail-oriented with a keen eye for visual aesthetics and design.

* Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.

* Familiarity with e-commerce platforms and online advertising channels.



Also:

* You do what you say. You are passionate about delivering results and you always finish what you start. - You take pride in being able to keep your word.

* Have a high attention to detail. When it comes to details, nothing gets past you.. and we mean nothing! - So much so that we want you to include "the devil is in the details" as the answer to the first question when you submit your application. Seriously.

* Preferably you have a couple of years experience in this field, and have worked for other dropshipping and e-commerce companies. You must understand how paid advertising works, in the sense that you know how sending traffic to an online store should lead to conversions.



Salary Expectations:

You will start as Trainee Ad Creative Specialist, where you will be working on the side of the company owner with compensation of 5$/hr. You will start as parttimer, but if everything goes well, this can grow into a fulltime job.



We always start with a one-month trial to ensure safety for both parties. After that, we'll have an evaluation to see if both parties would like to proceed to work together.



Benefits:

* Get to work in a young company with lots of ambitions

* Work fully remote

* Get paid every two weeks, instead of once per month (13 times per year)

* Upgrade your knowledge and skills in the fastest growing industry: digital marketing



If you can commit to and live with the following principles, then you are the type of person who will be successful and help our company thrive. If you feel this level of engagement is not right for you or that you're not willing or able to participate with us at this level, we are not a good fit for you.



Our expectation is that you will take the steps necessary to do what you say you are going to do and be accountable for your actions. In other words, live 'Above the line'.



Are you looking for a new adventure? Make sure you apply today!

COMPENSATION

/month if you can handle the volume and put in hard work! ????

title: Meta Media Buyer
description:

title: Video Editor -  eCommerce & Marketing
description:
About Us

GroundingWell is a $100M revenue eCommerce company selling grounding and earthing health products (bedsheets, mats, shoes) to customers worldwide. We’re a remote team spanning Australia, the USA, Canada, and the Philippines.



What You’ll Do

• Edit short-form and long-form video content for paid social ads, landing pages, and product pages

• Create scroll-stopping video ads optimized for platforms like Meta, TikTok, and YouTube

• Cut, sequence, and refine raw footage into polished, on-brand video assets

• Add motion graphics, captions, and sound design to enhance video performance

• Simplify complex product concepts into compelling visual stories



Requirements

• Proficient in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro (required)

• Familiarity with motion graphics tools (After Effects or similar) is a plus

• Experience editing video for eCommerce or direct-response advertising)

• Strong eye for pacing, storytelling, and visual rhythm

•  Extreme attention to detail in every cut, caption, and transition

• Ability to communicate design ideas clearly (verbally and visually) and take feedback efficiently

• Available to work at least 8 hours per day with 4-5 of those hours aligned with the EST time zone to ensure effective communication.



Why Work With Us

We pay above-market rates and offer generous bonuses for creative ideas that perform well in our marketing. We’re a direct-response advertising company, which means the effectiveness of your creative work is directly measurable by its profitability when used as paid advertising on social media. Great designers earn significantly more in performance bonuses than their base salary. Your graphics will be used across all advertising channels across the entire business. If you’re someone who constantly generates ideas and wants to be recognised and paid for it, this is the role for you.



How to Apply

Send your portfolio (or 3–5 samples of your best work) and a brief message about why you’re interested. Shortlisted candidates will be sent a short application form and then invited to a paid task.

title: 3D CAD Designer
description:
The goal of the Sensory Room Design (SRD) team is to successfully close large sales that involve sensory rooms. They focus on designing a room specific to the client’s needs with great attention to detail. 



The 3D CAD Designer creates 3D models of interior spaces from images and floor plans as well as building sensory  equipment sold by the company to be put into the room model. Models will need to be in true-to-life color and rendered in high resolution.



Responsibilities and Process: 

1. Create accurate 3D models of interior spaces from images and floor plans using Rhino3D

2. Understanding floor plans/blueprints and noticing if there are any inaccuracies.

3. Building sensory equipment sold by the company to be put into the room model using Rhino 3D

4. Render Room models using Keyshot and providing good quality final images

5. Meet deadlines

6. Make corrections and changes as needed

7. Be flexible and accept critique willingly

8. Pay attention to detail

9. Accept projects from other departments such as graphics or product development.



Qualifications/ Required Skills:

2. Ability to follow instructions and communicate effectively

3. Ability to work under pressure to meet tight deadlines

4. Ability to create 3D CAD designs to scale

- SensaSoft™ Squeezie Seat

title: VIDEO EDITOR
description:
We Don't Need a Video Editor. We Need a Performance Creative Machine Who Makes Ads That Print Money.

Video Editor - Performance Creatives

Most video editors make pretty videos. You'll make ads that stop the scroll and scale to millions in spend.



About Rescale Media

We're not just another e-commerce company. We're a brand incubator on a mission to build enduring, value-driven brands that bring meaningful products into families' lives.

We've scaled from just drop shipping to a 30+ person team doing $1M+/month. Our goal? Multi 9-figures. And we're just getting started.



???? Learn more at 
dia

Our Core Values

???? GENIUSES & OWNERS We partner with builders who think like founders. Not employees waiting to be told what to do—owners who see a problem and fix it.

? ITERATIONS > HOURS We don't measure success by time at your desk. We measure it by how fast you can test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

???? TRUTH OVER EGO We prioritize honesty and clarity, even when it's uncomfortable. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.



The Role

You won't be making corporate videos or cinematic masterpieces. You'll be making ads that convert—fast-paced, scroll-stopping content that turns viewers into buyers.

You'll work directly with our Creative Strategists who develop the concepts and hooks. Your job is to bring those concepts to life with edits that hit hard in the first second and keep people watching.

We test a lot of creative. That means volume matters. You need to be fast without sacrificing quality—and smart enough to know which details matter and which don't.



What You'll Do

Edit direct response video ads for Meta, TikTok, and other platforms

Transform raw UGC footage, b-roll, and assets into high-converting ads

Execute on creative briefs from our Creative Strategists

title: Creative Strategist
description:
We Don't Need a Creative Strategist. We Need a Revenue-Generating Idea Machine.

Most creative strategists make pretty ads. You'll engineer the concepts that scale to millions in profitable revenue.



About Rescale Media

We're not just another e-commerce company. We're a brand incubator on a mission to build enduring, value-driven brands that bring meaningful products into families' lives.

We've scaled from just drop shipping to a 30+ person team doing $1M+/month. Our goal? Multi 9-figures. And we're just getting started. Learn more at 
dia



Our Core Values

- GENIUSES & OWNERS We partner with builders who think like founders. Not employees waiting to be told what to do—owners who see a problem and fix it.

- ITERATIONS > HOURS We don't measure success by time at your desk. We measure it by how fast you can test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

- TRUTH OVER EGO We prioritize honesty and clarity, even when it's uncomfortable. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.



The Role

This is the role that moves the needle more than any other. Our Creative Strategists don't just come up with ideas—they architect the concepts, angles, and hooks that turn cold audiences into raving customers.

You'll work at the intersection of psychology, data, and creativity. Every concept you develop will be tested, measured, and either scaled or killed based on real performance data.

Our brands serve faith-led families and parents who want magic in their children's lives. You'll create advertising that resonates deeply with these audiences—not cheap manipulation, but genuine connection.



We require at least 3-5 concepts per week and are open to working with freelancers.



What You'll Do:

- Develop creative concepts, angles, and hooks that drive profitable customer acquisition

- Write ad scripts, headlines, and copy that convert

- Analyze performance data to understand what's working and why

- Brief video editors and designers on creative execution

- Manage the creative testing pipeline—always have winners in the queue

- Stay on top of creative trends, competitor ads, and market dynamics

- Collaborate with Media Buyers to understand what's scaling and what's not

- Build and maintain our creative knowledge base (what works for our brands)



What We're Looking For

- 3+ years of creative strategy experience in DTC/e-commerce

- Portfolio of ads you've created that scaled to significant spend

- Deep understanding of direct response principles

- Strong copywriting skills—you can write a hook that stops the scroll

- Data literacy—you can read a dashboard and extract insights

- Experience briefing creative teams (video editors, designers)

- Understanding of Meta's ad ecosystem and creative best practices



Bonus Points:

- Experience with faith-based or family-oriented brands

- Background in UGC strategy and influencer creative

- You've built creative processes from scratch

- Performance marketing or media buying experience

- Strong understanding of consumer psychology



This Role Is NOT For...

We're being direct because we respect your time:

- Creatives who care more about awards than results

- Those who can't take feedback on their "babies"

- Anyone who thinks strategy and execution are separate jobs

- People who aren't comfortable with rapid iteration and testing



Compensation & Benefits

- Monthly Salary: $2,000 - $3,000/month

Plus:

- Monthly performance bonuses tied to company Operating Profit (5-25% of salary)

- Quarterly profit pool distribution (2-7.5% of company profits shared among team)

- Ad Bounty Program: Earn 2-7% commission on ad spend for high-performing creatives (ROAS 2.1+)

- Remote-first environment (European timezone preferred)

- Work with a team of A-players who actually give a damn

- Direct founder access—no layers of bureaucracy

- Real ownership of your domain—we don't micromanage



Our Hiring Process

We don't waste time—yours or ours. Here's how it works:

Step 1: Application (You're here!)

Step 2: Initial Interview with Founder

Step 3: Internal Assessment by Rescale

Step 4: WhatsApp update for next steps

Step 5: Signing of Independent Contractor and NDA

Step 6: Onboarding and Training



Total timeline: 1 week from application to offer.



Ready to Apply?

[  
  ]

Complete the application form above. Be thorough—this is your first impression.



P.S. Our best-performing ad ever was a simple concept that took 20 minutes to write. It's generated over $1M in revenue. If you understand why simplicity often wins, we should talk.

P.P.S. If you're reading this far, you're already more thorough than 90% of applicants. That's exactly who we want.

title: Illustrator – Cute Character-Based Toy Brand (Female)

We need a talented illustrator who can bring these characters to life across products, packaging, and digital content — someone who genuinely enjoys drawing cute things and can keep a consistent style while staying versatile.



What You'll Be Doing

- Adapting characters into different themes and seasonal editions (holiday, limited drops, collabs)

- Occasionally creating simple animations or GIFs for social content (a plus, not required)

- Working with the team to maintain a cohesive brand style guide



Who We're Looking For

- Strong portfolio showing cute / kawaii / character illustration work

- Comfortable drawing in a consistent style while adapting to different moods and contexts

- Proficient in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop (Procreate is a bonus)

- Understands social media visual trends — knows what performs well on Instagram, TikTok, etc.

- Reliable, communicative, and comfortable working remotely with a team across time zones

- Can handle multiple projects and meet deadlines without constant supervision

To Apply - Please send:

We're building something fun and we want someone who's excited to grow with us.

title: Virtual Assistant / Video Editor (Strong English Required – Basic Clean Editing)
description:
You must include your portfolio or an example of your editing capabilities to get accepted for this job.



Also, you must read the whole job post as we will be checking for this in the applications.



We're looking for a long-term tea
mber who has very strong, natural English and can handle basic but clean, professional video edits.



Also someone who can take over tasks that require a deep understanding of what works well on youtube, such as making youtube video scripts that actual hook the viewer in and feel natural, putting together clips to make videos, video idea research, and potentially even making thumbnails if qualified.



We're not expecting advanced animation or super high-level editing, although that would be a plus, and we would pay a different rate for that.



However for this role, what matters most is:

1. Your English comprehension

2. Knowing how to keep a viewer engaged with simple edits, and at least able to edit like this: (link removed)

3. Being able to understand more complex topics like options trading and ecommerce

4. Attention to detail, and ability to make videos feel clean, smooth, and natural by cutting out mistakes, and unnecessary parts



About Us:



We are a YouTube content management agency that works with finance-focused creators (topics like options trading, eCommerce, etc.). We help creators produce, edit, and scale their content.



We’re a small, tight-knit team, and I work closely 1-on-1 with everyone.



What You’ll Be Doing:



1. Editing talking-head style and screenshare YouTube videos

2. Using tools like Descript for auto-cutting and whatever video editor software you normally use

3. Watching through full videos and:

  3a. Cutting out mistakes, pauses, and mess-ups

  3b. Keeping what sounds natural and flows well

  3c. Making edits feel clean, simple, and professional

4. Assisting with:

  4a. YouTube script creation (using ChatGPT)

  4b. Basic content structuring for videos

  4c. Occasionally helping with presentations for videos

5. If there are no projects, you will be asked to take clips of old videos to and rearrange them to make a new video (this will be explained during training). Essentially, the content we can make is unlimited so you can get as much work as you want with this method of recycling and making new content.



What we're Looking For:



Very strong English almost like a native (one of the most important things)

You must be able to tell what sounds natural vs. awkward in videos so you know what to cut out and what to keep in



Basic video editing skills:



You don’t need advanced effects or animations

But you must have a good sense of clean editing and pacing



Ability to understand (or quickly learn) topics like:

Options trading

eCommerce

Fast learner who can pick up systems and workflows quickly

Good communication habits:

Respond quickly

Ask questions

Stay in touch consistently



On your application to this post, make the first line "I read the entire job post" so that I know you read the job post fully.



Work Style & Expectations



Willing to work closely with me 1-on-1

Open to training and learning my workflows

Available most days of the week

At first, not constant work every day, but you should be available when projects come in

If you prove you're capable of the job work will become consistent

Able to meet deadlines consistently



Growth Opportunity



This is not just a basic VA role.



If you do well:



Pay will increase as you take on more complex tasks

You can grow into:

Managing multiple clients

Overseeing other editors

Taking on higher-level responsibilities in the agency



If you’re someone who:



Understands content deeply

Can make clean edits

Communicates well

And wants to grow long-term



Then this is a great opportunity.

This role requires someone who can think analytically, handle structured data with precision, navigate multiple digital tools confidently, and write professional business English without hesitation. title: Creative Stategist For Ecommerce Brand
description:
We're a growing direct-to-consumer brand and we're looking for a Creative Strategist to help us scale our paid social performance. This role is for someone who lives at the intersection of data and creativity — equally comfortable reading ad metrics and briefing a video shoot. You'll own how we think about creative, and you'll be the reason our Meta ads don't look like everyone else's.



What you'll do

Experience scripting or directing short-form video (Reels, TikTok-style content)

Background in copywriting or brand strategy

Familiarity with landing page and post-click optimisation

title: Executive Virtual Assistant (Advanced)
description:
**Job Title: Founder's Right Hand — Operator & Personal Assistant**



**About the role**



I'm Noah Morris, founder of two multi-million dollar companies. Both are growing fast and I need one person I can trust completely to sit between me and everything else professionally and personally.



This is not a VA role. This is not a chief of staff role. This is not a customer support role.



The closest description is a mini solo founder who works for me, and someone I consider a trusted person in my life. Someone who can context-switch between technical research, writing, design, finance, communications, and product work — all in the same day — and figure out whatever they don't already know using AI. Someone who is always on, always thinking, never drops the ball, and is two steps ahead before I even ask.



I will catch everything that is not up to standard. Do not apply if you are not genuinely exceptional.

i promise it's not an easy role, but it will be by far the best paid & life changing role you could land



A small note: writing this job post, reviewing the applications that come in, and shortlisting candidates for me is itself one of the tasks included in this role. If that excites you rather than confuses you, keep reading.



---



**What this role actually looks like day to day**



No two days are the same. Some real scenarios you will face:



- It is 2am and I get tagged in 
 by a user with a technical problem. You see it before I do, draft a reply, and handle it.

- A developer says they cannot find a solution. You spend two hours researching, find three possible approaches, and summarise them so I can d
.

- I have a 90 minute meeting transcript. You extract every action item, assign owners, and make sure nothing disappears.

- My bank sends a threatening letter. You gather the documents, draft the response, and present it ready to send.

- I am in back to back meetings. You monitor my inbox and WhatsApp, draft replies, and flag anything urgent.

- Something I asked the team to execute two weeks ago has not been done. You noticed before I did, escalated, and resolved it.

- I need to hop on a call with a partner but cannot make it. You join in my stead, represent me professionally, and brief me afterward.

- Someone needs a no fro
. You deliver it clearly and diplomatically in my voice without it ever reaching me.

- My girlfriend's birthday is in two weeks. You researched gifts, shortlisted three, I picked one, you ordered it and booked the restaurant. I just show up.

- You noticed something going wrong in the team before anyone flagged it. You brought it to me with context and a proposed solution already prepared.

- You proactively researched something you knew would be useful to me this week — a tool, a finding, a competitive move — without being asked.



---



**What we need from you**



**Intelligence**

- Exceptionally smart — not book smart, operationally smart. You think fast, connect dots, and produce work that is actually good

- I will catch everything that is not up to standard. Do not cut corners or approximate

- You learn any tool or platform faster than most — Stripe, Photoshop, Figma, Cursor, Airtable, whatever — and within days you are operating at a high level

- You are proactively researching, thinking ahead, and bringing things to me before I ask



**Technical**

- AI-native — Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor are your daily tools and you get serious output from them

- Can vibe code dashboards, trackers, and internal tools from scratch

- Comfortable doing deep technical research and translating it into clear decision-ready summaries

- Solid understanding of how SaaS products, APIs, and digital tools work

- If you have not used a tool before you will figure it out fast and do it better than most



**Communication**

- Excellent written English — you will speak on my behalf to users, partners, banks, developers, and candidates

- Can write in any register and have it sound right every time

- Can hop on calls and meetings in my place and represent me professionally

- Can deliver a no on my behalf without burning the relationship

- Proactively flags when something is going wrong — does not wait to be asked



**Availability**

- Close to 24/7 with common sense applied

- Reachable and responsive at all times — evenings, weekends, across time zones

- If something urgent comes up at 2am you handle it or flag it immediately



**Trust**

- You will have access to my finances, communications, business documents, and personal life

- I need someone I can trust completely with extremely sensitive information — this is non-negotiable and the most important quality on this list

- Discretion is absolute. What happens in this role stays in this role

- Over time I want this to feel less like an employment relationship and more like a trusted person in my life who I rely on completely



---



**Who we are looking for**



Someone who has probably felt overqualified in every previous role. Naturally curious, figures things out without being told how, and finds real satisfaction in making a chaotic environment run smoothly. You have likely already used AI to do work that takes most people three times as long. You think two steps ahead, act before being asked, and take quiet pride in nothing falling through the cracks. When given a new tool you do not ask for a tutorial — you figure it out and then do it better than the people who have been using it for years.



---



**Who we are not looking for**



- Someone who needs detailed instructions for every task

- Someone who works strictly 9 to 5 and disappears after that

- Someone who has only ever done traditional VA or admin work

- Someone uncomfortable with ambiguity or fast-changing priorities

- Someone who treats AI as optional

- Someone who cuts corners and hopes it goes unnoticed — it will not

- Someone who cannot be fully trusted with sensitive information



---



**Compensation**



If you are the right person I am happy to pay whatever it takes. Salary is flexible based on what you bring with raises as you grow. Long term role — the right person grows alongside the companies. If things go well I will happily sponsor your visa and fly you out to join me in Dubai, south of Europe, or wherever we are based at the time.



---



**How to apply**



Do not send a generic application. Write me one short paragraph — maximum 150 words — describing a problem you solved that required you to figure something out completely from scratch with no clear instructions. Include what tools or methods you used and what the outcome was. Applications without this will not be read.

Important Note:

title: Lead Generation & Appointment Setter
description:
**About the Role**



We are a UK-based financial advisory firm working with accountancy practices and professional networks to distribute business protection services. We're looking for a proactive, articulate, and self-motivated Virtual Assistant to take ownership of our outreach and lead generation activity.



This is a front-facing role. You will represent the firm in conversations with prospects — sometimes acting on behalf of the principal directly, sometimes as a representative of the business. Either way, professionalism, judgement, and strong English communication are essential.



---



**What You'll Be Doing**



› Researching and identifying accountancy firms, independent accountants, SMEs, and small professional offices (translation, legal, HR, etc.) as prospective leads

› Managing and posting on LinkedIn — not for social engagement, but targeted outreach and connection-building with decision-makers

› Conducting outreach and follow-up via WhatsApp Business and other messaging channels

› Sending and managing
s to warm and cold prospects

› Booking discovery calls and meetings directly into the principal's diary

› Monitoring and responding to inbound messages across platforms

› Maintaining a clear pipeline log — tracking outreach, responses, follow-ups, and outcomes

› Suggesting and testing new outreach approaches over time



---



**Who We're Looking For**



› Fluent, confident written and spoken English — this is non-negotiable

› Experience in outreach, lead generation, appointment setting, or sales support

› Comfortable representing a professional services firm in direct conversation with business owners and accountants

› Organised and reliable — managing a diary and following up across multiple channels simultaneously

› Proactive and resourceful — you don't wait to be told; you identify opportunities and act

› Familiar with LinkedIn, WhatsApp Business, and
 outreach strategies

› Available during UK business hours (GMT/BST) — this is a firm requirement



---



**Platforms You'll Work On**



LinkedIn · WhatsApp Business ·
/Instagram ·
 · Diary/Calendar



---



**Trial Period**



The role starts as a part-time trial at $3/hour, 25 hours per week (5 hours per day). Hours must align with UK business hours. Successful candidates will have the opportunity to grow with the firm as activity scales.



---



**Screening Task**



To be considered, you must complete the following task. Applications without it will not be reviewed.



*Task: Write a Cold LinkedIn Connection Request*



Write a LinkedIn connection request message as if you were reaching out on behalf of a UK-based financial advisory firm to the owner or senior partner of a small accountancy practice.



Your message should:

· Be under 300 characters (LinkedIn's connection note limit)

· Sound natural and human — not like a template

· Give a clear, relevant reason for connecting

· Not pitch a product or service directly



There is no single right answer. We are looking at your judgement, tone, and understanding of professional outreach.



---



**How to Apply**



Send us your completed screening task along with a short introduction — tell us who you are, your experience with LinkedIn outreach or lead generation, and any results you've achieved (meetings booked, response rates, campaigns run). Specific examples carry far more weight than general claims.



Applications will be reviewed and scored. Only those who complete the task will be considered.

title: Especialista em Aquisição de 100 Avaliações para Saas na Shopify App Store
description:
We are looking for a specialist in review acquisition for our new SaaS, which will be launched on the Shopify App Store.



The main objective is to obtain 100 reviews from Shopify store owners in the United States to improve our ranking within the Shopify App Store.



The professional will be responsible for:



Proactively identifying and reaching out to Shopify stores based in the United States.



Offering a 30-day free trial of our SaaS, clearly explaining its benefits (increased customer retention and store revenue).



Ensuring that store owners successfully install the SaaS on their store and use it effectively.



Following up with store owners during the trial period to ensure satisfaction and proper usage of the product.



Collecting reviews from store owners on the Shopify App Store.



We expect each cycle — outreach, installation, trial usage, and review collection — to take approximately 3 days.



The initial goal is to reach 100 reviews within 2 weeks or less, as the free trial offer will be discontinued after this milestone. Speed in acquiring reviews is critical for a successful launch.



We are looking for a professional with excellent communication skills, proactivity and ownership, experience in prospecting and client relationship management, and preferably experience in e-commerce or SaaS.
