title: VIDEO EDITOR
description:
We Don't Need a Video Editor. We Need a Performance Creative Machine Who Makes Ads That Print Money.

Most video editors make pretty videos. You'll make ads that stop the scroll and scale to millions in spend.



About Rescale Media

We're not just another e-commerce company. We're a brand incubator on a mission to build enduring, value-driven brands that bring meaningful products into families' lives.

We've scaled from just drop shipping to a 30+ person team doing $1M+/month. Our goal? Multi 9-figures. And we're just getting started. Learn more at 
dia



Our Core Values:

- GENIUSES & OWNERS We partner with builders who think like founders. Not employees waiting to be told what to do—owners who see a problem and fix it.

- ITERATIONS > HOURS We don't measure success by time at your desk. We measure it by how fast you can test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

- TRUTH OVER EGO We prioritize honesty and clarity, even when it's uncomfortable. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.



The Role

- You won't be making corporate videos or cinematic masterpieces. You'll be making ads that convert—fast-paced, scroll-stopping content that turns viewers into buyers.

- You'll work directly with our Creative Strategists who develop the concepts and hooks. Your job is to bring those concepts to life with edits that hit hard in the first second and keep people watching.

- We test a lot of creative. That means volume matters. You need to be fast without sacrificing quality—and smart enough to know which details matter and which don't.



What You'll Do

- Edit direct response video ads for Meta, TikTok, and other platforms

- Transform raw UGC footage, b-roll, and assets into high-converting ads

- Execute on creative briefs from our Creative Strategists

- Produce multiple ad variations and iterations quickly

- Add motion graphics, text overlays, captions, and sound design

- Maintain organized project files and asset libraries

- Hit deadlines consistently—we move fast

- Learn from performance data and apply insights to future edits



What We're Looking For

- 2+ years of video editing experience

- Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or CapCut

- Portfolio of direct response or social media ads you've edited

- Understanding of what makes content work on Meta/TikTok (pacing, hooks, trends)

- Ability to work fast without sacrificing quality

- Experience with motion graphics and text animation

- Strong attention to detail—audio sync, color, pacing all matter



Bonus Points:

- Experience editing for DTC/e-commerce brands

- After Effects skills for motion graphics

- Understanding of direct response principles

- You've edited ads that actually scaled

- Experience with UGC-style content



This Role Is NOT For...

We're being direct because we respect your time:

- Editors who only know cinematic/narrative work

- Those who can't handle high volume and fast turnarounds

- Anyone who needs hand-holding on every edit

- People who take feedback personally instead of professionally

- Editors who think the algorithm is wrong when an ad doesn't perform



Compensation & Benefits

Monthly Salary: $1,000/month



Plus:

- Monthly performance bonuses tied to company Operating Profit (5-25% of salary)

- Quarterly profit pool distribution (2-7.5% of company profits shared among team)

- Remote-first environment

- Work with a team of A-players who actually give a damn

- Direct founder access—no layers of bureaucracy

- Real ownership of your domain—we don't micromanage



Our Hiring Process

We don't waste time—yours or ours. Here's how it works:

Step 1: Application (You're here!)

Step 2: Initial Interview with Founder

Step 3: Internal Assessment by Rescale

Step 4: WhatsApp update for next steps

Step 5: Signing of Independent Contractor and NDA

Step 6: Onboarding and Training

Total timeline: 1 week from application to offer.



Ready to Apply?

[ 
 ]

Complete the application form above. Be thorough—this is your first impression.



P.S. Our best-performing ads aren't the most polished—they're the ones that hook in the first second and don't let go. If you understand why a rough UGC edit can outperform a cinematic masterpiece, we should talk.



P.P.S. If you're reading this far, you're already more thorough than 90% of applicants. That's exactly who we want.

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 2+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Real Estate Underwriter
description:
Join Easydwell: Contribute to Innovative Homeownership Solutions



Easydwell is a rapidly expanding real estate fund dedicated to redefining access to and management of homeownership. We seek a meticulous and analytical Underwriter who excels in critical thinking, precision, and sound decision-making.



Ideal candidates possess a strong aptitude for quantitative analysis, challenge assumptions, and demonstrate a commitment to uncovering insights through comprehensive data review. If you have a disciplined underwriting approach and aspire to take ownership in a dynamic, high-growth setting, this role may be well-suited for you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

You will be responsible for safeguarding portfolio integrity by conducting risk evaluations with accuracy, consistency, and sound judgment.

- Property Valuation & Market Analysis

Perform and interpret comparative market analyses (comps) to determine realistic property values and identify market trends.

- Risk Assessment

Review applicant financials, credit reports, and property-level data to evaluate overall risk exposure.

- Underwriting Decisions

Deliver informed recommendations to approve, decline, or counter applications in accordance with Easydwell’s established underwriting standards.

- Documentation Review & Verification

Cross-check all submitted documents to ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance, identifying red flags or discrepancies when present.

- Clear Internal Communication

Prepare concise, professionally written reports detailing underwriting decisions and rationale for internal stakeholders.



What We’re Looking For

This position is ideal for analytical professionals who prioritize precision, accountability, and uphold high standards.

- Strong Numerical & Analytical Skills

Exceptional comfort working with financial data, identifying patterns, and drawing defensible conclusions.

- Advanced Excel Proficiency

Confident using formulas, structured models, and data organization to support underwriting decisions.

- Real Estate Valuation Experience (Preferred)

Prior experience running comps and evaluating property values in real estate or related markets is strongly preferred.

- Relevant Background

Experience in underwriting—within real estate, mortgage, or financial services—is preferred. Candidates with robust finance or analytical backgrounds and demonstrated learning agility will also be considered.

- Excellent English Communication

Clear, professional written and verbal communication is essential, including strong pronunciation for effective collaboration with global teams.

title: Amazon Germany Sales & Listing Optimiser - Top Level
description:
We are a fast-growing ecommerce business managing multiple brands across Amazon Europe. We are looking for an experienced Amazon Germany Account Analyst with a minimum of 5 years hands-on experience in the German Amazon marketplace.



This role is focused on daily performance analysis, keyword ranking, SEO optimisation and competitor tracking, with the goal of improving organic visibility and driving sales growth in Germany.





Key Responsibilities



Daily Sales & Performance Analysis

 • Monitor and analyse daily sales performance on Amazon Germany

 • Identify trends, issues and opportunities across key metrics

 • Report on sales, sessions, conversion rate and returns





Keyword Ranking & SEO Optimisation

 • Track keyword rankings using tools (e.g. Helium 10)

 • Identify opportunities to improve organic ranking and indexing

 • Optimise titles, bullet points and backend search terms for the German market

 • Ensure listings are fully optimised for German language and search behaviour





Listing & Conversion Optimisation

 • Review and improve product listings to increase conversion

 • Ensure images, A+ content and copy are aligned with German customer expectations

 • Suggest improvements based on performance data and customer feedback







Competitor & Market Analysis

 • Monitor key competitors within the German marketplace

 • Analyse pricing, keywords, reviews and positioning

 • Identify trends and recommend actions to maintain competitiveness





Continuous Growth & Optimisation

 • Identify underperforming products and implement improvements

 • Continuously test and refine SEO and conversion strategies

 • Provide actionable insights to drive sales growth



Requirements (Essential)

 • Minimum 5+ years experience managing Amazon Germany (DE marketplace)

 • Proven track record of improving rankings, SEO and sales performance

 • Strong understanding of German Amazon SEO and customer behaviour

 • Experience with tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout or similar

 • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

 • Fluent English (German is highly preferred)



Highly Desirable

 • Experience managing other German ecommerce channels (e.g. Otto, Kaufland, Zalando, Shopify DE)

 • Experience with A+ content and listing image optimisation

 • Ability to analyse and improve conversion rates

 • Experience working with international ecommerce brands







What Success Looks Like

 • Improved keyword rankings across priority products

 • Increased organic sales in Amazon Germany

 • Highly optimised listings (SEO + conversion)

 • Clear reporting and proactive identification of growth opportunities

title: Lead Generation Specialist
description:
We are in need of a Lead Generation Specialist who can:

a. Support our sales team by sourcing leads using LINKEDIN SALES NAVIGATOR and a variety of websites online (organic search) and vet the quality of leads obtained by checking the lead's website AND social media pages

b. Source leads for a multitude of clients using our lead generation software and a variety of websites online and vet the quality of leads obtained by checking the lead's online reviews and Google ratings

c. Double-checking the validity and accuracy of the PoC name, phone numbers, and
 addresses obtained by cross-referencing the obtained information from the business's website and/or social media page

d) Create weekly and monthly reports 



Skills / attributes we're looking for:

a) Proven experience with online lead search and maintaining leads databases

b) Proficient in Google Workspace (Google Sheets mainly)

c) Strong project and time management skills

d) Tech-savvy and resourceful

e) Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal

f) Problem-solving and critical thinking skills: being able to think on your feet and quickly determine the path forward when faced with an obstacle

g) Proactive attitude

h) Able to work on a graveyard shift

i) Experience working with Western companies



Requirements:

a) You must be working from the Philippines

b) You must be willing to work as an independent contractor

c) Has a main and backup working computer

d) Has a main and backup internet

e) Has a plan or back up for power outages



Other information:

a) This is a 40-hour per week role.

b) No paid vacations / no paid holidays but you can take time off when you'd like and work more the days surrounding time off to ensure you're still paid for 40 hours.

c) 13th month will be honored as follows: the number of months worked, divided by 12, times your average monthly earnings.

d) Pay starts at 150 USD per week and we pay weekly via Gusto.



The role is primarily data research and entry; mainly we will be contracting you to search leads and the lead's information and validate these leads. 



NOTE: Only qualified candidates will be invited to take the assessment & scheduled for the interview(s). Please send me a well-written paragraph on why I should consider your application and why you are a great fit for this role we're looking to fill.



If you only send a link to your resume, a one-sentence
, or a generic application letter, you will not be considered for the position.



Thank you for your time and interest.

title: Hiring: Full-Time AI Video Creator
description:
I'm looking for one highly motivated individual to join me long-term in a flexible, daily work position creating AI-generated TikTok videos. This is perfect for someone who values consistent pay, works independently, and wants to grow with a creative team.

Compensation:

Base Pay: $450/month

Pay Cycle: Paid every 15 days (50%)

Bonus: Earn extra based on output — the more videos you make, the more you earn. One of my creators recently made an extra $1,300 in a single month!

Important: This role requires reliability. Bad communication or no-shows are not tolerated. We need you every day. (Open to discussing one day off per week.)

Requirements:



Must have a good laptop or PC — no slow or outdated devices

Strong, stable internet connection is non-negotiable

Must work 7 days a week (~4 hours/day, flexible schedule)

Must know your way around AI tools — especially Higgsfield and Google Flow

Strong English skills — content is created for U.S. audiences

Self-driven and independent — minimal micromanagement



Bonus Points:



Prior experience creating AI-generated video content

Skill in AI prompt writing and image generation



How to Apply:

Add me on 

Send a message titled "TikTok video creator" and tell me:



Your name

A description or example of your experience with AI tools or TikTok videos

Why you think you'd be a good fit



Serious and committed applicants only. Stable, long-term opportunity with real earning potential.

title: Recruiter for Appointment Setter Hiring
description:
Recruiter for Appointment Setter Hiring



Remote | Full-Time | Base Pay + Hiring Bonuses



We are hiring a recruiter to help us find and screen appointment setters for our team at TaskPilot.



This role is focused on helping us hire people for an outbound calling position. These appointment setters speak with US business owners and either transfer live calls or book appointments for our closer.



The goal of this role is to help us consistently bring on 8 new hires per week as part of a 2 person recruiting team.



You will be part of a 2 person hiring team focused on finding, screening, onboarding, and helping new hires start strong and stay on track. We already have sales promos and hiring materials in place, but we are open to changes and good ideas.



This is a team based role, but we still want people who can take ownership, move fast, and use good judgment without needing constant direction.



Responsibilities



• Post and manage job ads  

• Review applications  

• Follow up with candidates  

• Request and review audio samples  

• Screen for spoken English, confidence, and professionalism  

• Shortlist strong candidates  

• Help move candidates through the hiring process  

• Help new hires get started and stay on track



Where You Can Find Candidates



• OnlineJobs.ph  

•
 groups  

• Referrals  

• Other channels you already know how to use



Requirements



• Experience in recruiting, hiring, sales, appointment setting, call center work, or BPO  

• Strong written English  

• Organized and dependable  

• Able to work independently  

• Good judgment when evaluating people  

• Comfortable reviewing audio and screening for confidence, professionalism, and phone ability  

• Experience helping new hires get started, stay accountable, and perform well in the early stage of a role



Preferred



• Experience hiring for BPO, call center, appointment setting, or sales roles  

• Experience working in a BPO or call center environment  

• Management, team lead, or supervisory experience in recruiting, sales, call center, or BPO environments  

• Comfortable creating and using simple roleplay exercises as part of the screening process



Pay



• $4/hour base  

• $20 per new hire who officially starts  

• Additional $5 if that hire remains active for 30 days



Officially starts means the hire completes onboarding and begins working.



To apply, please send:



1. A short introduction  

2. Your experience  

3. The types of roles you have worked on  

4. Where you usually find candidates  

5. Your internet speed  

6. Your available working hours  

7. A 60 to 90 second audio introducing yourself and your background



Please put RECRUITER at the top of your application.



Thank you,  

Mike

title: Senior Accountant (Lead)
description:
Role Summary 



The Senior Accountant (Lead) is singularly responsible for all accounting, finance, and administrative needs of a small communications and marketing company with approximately 10 full-time employees, 10 +/- steady 1099 consultants, and additional staff/contractors that fluctuate to meet contract-by-contract client service needs. The Senior Accountant owns day-to-day accounting and bookkeeping operations, produces GAAP-compliant financials, manages budgeting and cash flow forecasting, supports client/job costing, and ensures accurate reconciliation of paid media buys. The Senior Accountant (Lead) will administer payroll (via ADP or QuickBooks), ?maintain strong internal controls and documentation, and prepare monthly GAAP compliant financial statements.? 

 



Key Responsibilities 



*Full-Cycle Accounting & Close 

*Own and execute the full-cycle accounting function (A/P, A/R, general ledger, journal entries, accruals, and month-end close). 

*Prepare and deliver monthly/quarterly/year-end financial statements in accordance with GAAP (Generally Accepted Accounting Principles). 

*Maintain a clean chart of accounts and ensure accurate coding/classification of all transactions. 

*Manage bank, credit card and balance sheet reconciliations; investigate and resolve discrepancies. 

*Manage vendor billing and client invoicing. 

*QuickBooks Online Ownership 

*Serve as QBO administrator, maintaining classes and projects, and optimizing QuickBooks Online (QBO) configuration, workflow integrity, and reporting. 

*Ensure QBO data integrity and clean documentation supporting all accounting activity and audit readiness. 



USA Taxes 

*Maintain accurate tax records 

*Support external tax preparer (CPA) 

*Coordinate quarterly and annual filings, including support of K1 owners tax filing needs. 



Budgeting & Cash Flow Forecasting 

*Build and maintain annual budgets in QuickBooks Online (or supported tools tied into QBO)? 

*Maintain updated project-level forecasts, including P&L by job/client contract 

*Maintain and update cash flow forecasts based on revenue forecasts from Executive Management, as well as receivables, payables, payroll timing, and media/client commitments.   

*Provide leadership with visibility into cash needs and variances, runway, and actual spending vs. planned. 



Time Tracking & Client/Job Costing 

*Track employee hours (TimeIQ or QBO timekeeper) and allocate/charge time to the appropriate billable client jobs/accounts. 

*Support client billing, reporting, and internal profitability analysis by client/project, including labor, ODC, travel and paid media pass-through allocations. 



Media Buy Reconciliation (U.S. Broadcast & Digital) 

*Reconcile media buys acrossbroadcast, digital, social, and programmatic placements.   

*Match vendor invoices to insertion orders (IOs), schedules, impressions/units, and proof-of-performance.   

*Flag and resolve discrepancies and coordinate resolution with internal stakeholders and vendors. 

*Ensure accurate pass-through billings and QBO bookings. 



Administration & Payroll 

*Prepare and process payroll using QuickBooks. 

*Maintain payroll records, ensure hours and allocations are correct, and support periodic payroll reporting. 

*Maintain accurate deductions, job allocations, and payroll documentation.   

*Manage payroll changes related to onboarding/offboarding. 

*HR/ Benefits Administration (Accounting Perspective) 

*Manage financial onboarding/offboarding, payroll setup, and benefit deductions.   

*Ensure timely renewals and payments for all benefit programs (medical/dental/vision insurance, 401K contributions and payments, etc). 

*Maintain insurance renewals, payments, COIs, and compliance. 

*Administrative Support (as needed for a small company) 

*Support routine finance/admin needs typical of a lean organization (vendor setup, documentation, basic process creation, etc.). 

*Maintain organized records for audits, tax preparation, and compliance (in coordination with external providers, if applicable). 

*Administer government and client invoice portals, registration portals, and required reporting.   

*Maintain multi-state business registrations and renewals (FL, CA, TX, GA, etc.), and pays annual or regularly scheduled fees on-time..   

*Manage Duns & Bradstreet profile to maintain excellent standing.? 



Required Qualifications 

*6+ years of full-cycle accounting experience; experience as sole or lead accountant.   

*Significant, hands-on experience serving as the primary accountant for a small business (owning end-to-end accounting). 

*Advanced proficiency with QuickBooks Online?(required). 

*Demonstrated ability to prepare GAAP-compliant financial statements. 

*Strong experience building budgets and cash flow forecasts, ideally within or alongside QBO. 

*Experience with timekeeping and allocating labor to billable client accounts (job costing/project accounting). 

*Experience reconciling complex vendor billing against orders—ideally including media buy reconciliation. 

*Payroll processing experience (via QuickBooks Payroll). 

*Experience with government portals, client invoicing systems, and multi-state compliance.   

*High attention to detail, strong organization, and ability to work independently with minimal oversight. 



Preferred Qualifications 

*Experience in advertising/media, agencies, or environments with media buying, proper allocation of labor hours per client billable work and vendor reconciliations. 

*Experience improving/standardizing processes and internal controls in a small company setting. 



Key Competencies 

*Ownership mentality and ability to operate independently 

*Strong judgment and discretion with confidential information 

*Clear communication with non-finance stakeholders 

*Deadline management (close, payroll, vendor cycles) 

*Analytical problem-solving and reconciliation skills 



*****How to apply*****

Please send your resume and cover letter to

title: Service Titan Dispatcher
description:
Dispatcher

Focus: Logistics, technician management, and ServiceTitan proficiency.



Job Overview:

Plumbing, Cooling, and Electrical Nerds is seeking a sharp, fast-thinking Dispatcher to lead our field team to success. You aren't just moving jobs around; you are a strategist who ensures our technicians are in the right place at the right time to maximize revenue and customer satisfaction.



Daily Expectations:



- Manage the dispatch board in ServiceTitan to optimize technician routes.

- Communicate directly with technicians to provide job details and updates.

- Monitor job progress and adjust schedules in real-time to prevent delays.

- Ensure "sold" jobs are scheduled promptly and efficiently.

- Maintain a high level of communication between the field and the office.





Preferred Skills & Experience:



- Must have significant experience with ServiceTitan.

- Previous experience dispatching in the trades (Plumbing, HVAC, or Electrical).

- Ability to handle high-pressure situations and quick pivots.

- Strong geographical knowledge (or ability to use mapping tools rapidly).

- Excellent verbal communication skills for coordinating with field staff.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Customer Service Representative (CSR)



Focus: Inbound booking, empathy, and ServiceTitan entry.



Job Overview:

As a CSR for Plumbing, Cooling, and Electrical Nerds, you are the first point of contact for customers in need. Your goal is to provide a 5-star "Nerd" experience by listening to customer concerns, diagnosing their needs over the phone, and booking appointments with speed and empathy.



Daily Expectations:



- Handle inbound calls from customers regarding plumbing, cooling, and electrical issues.

- Book appointments directly into ServiceTitan following company protocols.

- Maintain a high "Booking Rate" by overcoming customer objections.

- Provide clear information regarding service fees and technician arrival windows.

- Ensure every customer feels heard and valued from the first "hello."



Preferred Skills & Experience:



- Must have ServiceTitan experience.

- Previous experience in a CSR role, specifically within the home service industry.

- Superior English verbal skills with a friendly, professional tone.

- Ability to multitask: typing notes into the CRM while speaking with the customer.

- A "problem-solver" mindset—you don't just take calls; you provide solutions.

title: Research & Claims Specialist (Unclaimed Funds / Asset Recovery)
description:
Company Name:

D.R.Y Asset Recovery



Job Overview:

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based company focused on helping individuals recover unclaimed surplus funds from tax and foreclosure sales.

We are looking for a highly detail-oriented and reliable Research & Claims Specialist to assist with locating surplus funds, identifying rightful owners, and supporting the claims process from start to finish.

This is a long-term opportunity with growth potential for the right candidate.



Key Responsibilities:

• Research county websites to locate surplus / excess funds lists

• Extract and organize property and owner data into spreadsheets

• Skip trace individuals to locate contact information

• Assist in preparing claim packages and required documents

• Track deadlines, claim statuses, and follow-ups

• Communicate updates clearly and maintain organized records

• Follow step-by-step SOPs and improve workflows when needed

  Must be comfortable and confident speaking to people on the phone



Requirements:

• Strong attention to detail (this is critical)

• Experience with online research and data entry

• Familiarity with Google Sheets / Excel

• Ability to follow instructions exactly without cutting corners

• Strong written English communication

• Reliable internet and ability to meet deadlines

Bonus (Not Required but Preferred):

• Experience with skip tracing tools

• Knowledge of U.S. real estate, tax sales, or foreclosure processes

• Experience with CRM systems or case tracking (such as Go High Level or Excess Elite)



Compensation:

• Starting at $3 / hour (will increase over time)

• Performance-based bonuses available

• Opportunity for long-term role and increased pay



Work Schedule:

• Part-time to start (20–30 hours/week)

• Opportunity to grow into full-time



How to Apply:

To be considered, follow these steps exactly. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

Location Preference:

 We are primarily looking for applicants based in Cebu, Philippines.

Subject Line:

 Use: DRY Recovery – Detail Matters

Voice Recording (Required):

 Submit a 1–2 minute voice recording covering the following:

 • Tell me about yourself

 • Describe your experience with research, data entry, or related work

 • Explain why attention to detail is important in this role

              (We are evaluating communication skills, clarity, and confidence.)

Internet & Availability:

 Provide:

 • Internet speed (screenshot)

 • Backup internet (if any)

 • Available hours per week

Experience Summary:

 Briefly list any experience related to:

 • Online research

 • Data entry

 • Skip tracing

 • Tax liens

 • Foreclosure or surplus funds research

 • Real estate research

 • Claims processing, case management, or document preparation

Final Step (Attention Test):

 At the very end of your application, include this exact line:

 “Detail confirmed: Cebu applicant ready.”



Applications that do not follow all steps will not be reviewed.



Why Join Us:

We don’t just hire VAs, we build long-term team members.

If you are dependable, detail-oriented, and want to grow with a company that is scaling quickly, this is a strong opportunity.

title: HR Coordinator
description:
Job Title: HR Coordinator

Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Job Type: Full-Time

Timezone: Pacific Standard Time



About Us:

We are a dynamic and client-focused on HR, payroll and benefit services firm that supports small to mid-sized businesses across the U.S. Our team is committed to delivering accurate, compliant, and efficient HR and payroll solutions. We are looking for a knowledgeable and detail-oriented HR Coordinator to join our remote team.



Position Overview:

As an HR Coordinator, you’ll be responsible for handling day-to-day HR support for our U.S.-based clients. You should have a strong understanding of U.S. labor laws, basic payroll regulations, and HR best practices. This is a work-from-home role, ideal for someone who thrives in an autonomous, fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities:

Assist with onboarding and offboarding processes, including documentation

Maintain and update employee records, benefits, and tax information

Support HR functions such as employee relations, compliance, and reporting

Keep up-to-date with changes in labor laws and payroll regulations



Qualifications:

Proven experience in HR and Benefits, specifically supporting U.S.-based companies

Strong understanding of U.S. labor laws, and compliance

Familiarity with payroll platforms (e.g., ADP, Gusto, Paychex, QuickBooks, Paycom etc)

Experience with HR software and systems

Excellent organizational, communication, and problem-solving skills

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Ability to work independently in a remote setting

Confidentiality and professionalism are a must

Develop and implement HR strategies aligned with overall business objectives

Manage recruitment, on-boarding, and talent development programs

Oversee employee relations, performance management, and engagement initiatives

Ensure compliance with labor laws, company policies, and HR best practices (preferably US standards)

Administer compensation and benefits programs

Maintain HR systems, records, and reporting

Lead organizational development and culture-building initiatives



Preferred Qualifications:

Experience working in a client-facing or outsourced HR role

Certification such as PHR/SPHR is a plus but not required



What We Offer:

100% remote work environment

US Holiday off

Weekends off

Local and International Team Building activities

Government benefits allowance (SSS, Philhealth, Pag-ibig)

Collaborative and supportive remote team culture

Competitive compensation based on experience



How to Apply:

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Civil Engineer
description:
JOB ADVERTISEMENT – CIVIL ENGINEER (REMOTE)



FingerHug, a company based in Bosnia and Herzegovina specializing in architectural design, technical development, construction planning, and project support, is expanding its team and is looking for an experienced Civil Engineer for a remote position.



We are looking for a highly skilled, responsible, and self-driven professional with strong practical and technical knowledge of construction, especially from an execution and contractor’s perspective. The ideal candidate should be able to contribute to the technical planning, assessment, and development of projects with a clear understanding of structures, quantities, materials, and real construction requirements.



Requirements and qualifications:

• minimum 10 years of experience in the same or similar roles 

• strong professional background in civil engineering and construction execution 

• solid knowledge of structural systems, construction methods, and building materials 

• proven experience in preparing bills of quantities, quantity take-offs, and material assessments 

• ability to accurately calculate required quantities of key construction materials, including concrete, reinforcement steel, and other structural elements 

• strong understanding of contractor-side processes, site logic, and construction planning 

• ability to read, review, and interpret technical drawings, construction details, and project documentation 

• proficiency in relevant engineering software; knowledge of AutoCAD and similar technical tools is expected 

• strong computer skills 

• active command of the English language, both written and spoken 

• strong organizational and communication skills 

• independence, responsibility, and a professional approach to work 

• ability to work both independently and as part of a team in a remote environment 



Key responsibilities:

• reviewing and analyzing technical and construction documentation 

• preparing and verifying bills of quantities and material take-offs 

• supporting the technical evaluation of structural and construction solutions 

• contributing practical construction knowledge from an execution perspective 

• collaborating with the team to ensure technically sound, realistic, and efficient project solutions 

• helping align technical planning with execution realities, project requirements, and applicable standards 

• staying up to date with current construction practices, standards, and regulations 



What we offer:

• stable employment 

• remote work 

• opportunity to work on serious and professionally driven projects 

• competitive compensation, based on experience, knowledge, and contribution 

• a professional working environment and the opportunity for long-term cooperation 



Application:

Interested candidates are invited to send their CV to: 



Please use the following subject line: Application for Civil Engineer Position (Remote)



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: virtual assistant
description:
PLATFORMS & TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW

Platform

What You Need to Know

WordPress + WooCommerce


 is self-hosted on Nexcess with Elementor Pro. You’ll manage page updates, blog posts, product listings, and WooCommerce store settings. Must be comfortable editing in Elementor.

Canva

All social media graphics, promo assets, story templates, and marketing visuals. You must be able to maintain our cinematic, editorial brand aesthetic. No generic templates.


v

The Reckoning Vault is built on this platform. You need to understand the basic structure and be able to communicate updates/issues. Developer (Shohan) handles code-level changes.

Amazon KDP

Book and planner listings, keyword optimization, A+ content, category management. You’ll monitor ad campaigns and sales data.

Amazon Ads

Manage Sponsored Products campaigns. Currently running DF-AUTO-Discovery ($3/day) and HH-MANUAL-ExactMatch ($3/day). Must understand auto vs manual targeting, bid adjustments, and kill/scale criteria.

TikTok (Organic + Ads)

Post 1-2 clips daily. Manage TikTok Ads Manager — Traffic objective campaigns (NEVER Followers/Community Interaction). Understand Spark Ads setup.

Instagram / Reels

Cross-post content, engage in comments/DMs, grow followers through strategic engagement.

MailerLite


 marketing platform. Manage subscriber lists, segments, automated sequences (3
 nurture), and Rouge Reckoning branded templates. Sender: 

Payment processor for Vault subscriptions. Monitor subscriber counts and revenue. Do NOT need access to financial details — dashboard view only.

Etsy (Future)

We may expand product listings to Etsy. Knowledge of Etsy shop management, SEO, and listing optimization is a plus.

BookVault

Print-on-demand service for books and planners. Integration into 
 planned with Buy Direct buttons alongside Amazon links.

ElevenLabs

AI voice platform powering Crystal’s voice in The Reckoning Vault. You don’t need to operate it, but you need to understand what it is and how to talk about it.

CapCut

Video editing for TikTok/Reels/Shorts marketing content. Must be proficient.

YOUR SCOPE OF WORK

1. Content & Social Media Management

Build and maintain a weekly content calendar (approved by D.A. every Sunday night)

Post 1-2 TikTok/Reels clips daily using existing content library and new raw footage from D.A.

Design social graphics in Canva that match the brand aesthetic — cinematic, editorial, never generic

Write captions that sound like the brand: raw, specific, gut-punch energy. No fluff.

Engage in comments and DMs across TikTok, Instagram, and
 — build real community, not fake engagement

Repurpose long-form content (episodes, book excerpts, quotes) into bite-sized social content

Monitor trending audio and hashtags relevant to our niche (faith deconstruction, Black women’s fiction, starting over, glow-up culture)

2. Paid Advertising Support

Monitor and report on Amazon Ads campaigns (DF-AUTO-Discovery, HH-MANUAL-ExactMatch)

Set up and manage TikTok traffic campaigns ($3-5/day, Traffic objective ONLY)

Track ad spend vs. revenue weekly

Recommend kill/scale decisions based on ACOS and conversion data

Coordinate countdown deal campaigns (next window: May 2026) — align ads,
 blasts, and social pushes

3. Website & E-Commerce

Update 
 pages in Elementor Pro (product pages, blog posts, The Vault page)

Manage WooCommerce product listings and inventory

Ensure all links, CTAs, and funnels are working correctly

Help integrate BookVault Buy Direct buttons alongside Amazon links

Monitor site analytics (Jetpack stats — views, visitors, referrers, top content)

Update SEO metadata and page copy as directed

4.
 Marketing

Manage MailerLite subscriber lists and segments

Draft
 campaigns in the Rouge Reckoning voice (raw, electric, never generic — always leave them wanting more)

Monitor automated nurture sequence performance

Build new
 sequences for product launches and countdown deals

A/B test subject lines and send times

5. CRM & Organization

Maintain a task management system (Trello, Notion, or Asana — to be determined)

Track subscriber growth across Vault tiers (Free, Insider, Elite)

Tag and segment contacts in MailerLite based on behavior and purchases

Keep a running log of what’s working vs. what’s not across all channels

File management — keep shared Google Drive organized with assets, content, and reports

Prepare weekly performance summaries (sales, subscribers, engagement, ad performance)

6. Vertical Drama & Vault Promotion

Understand the vertical/short-form drama market and how The Reckoning Vault fits in it

Create promotional content specifically for the Vault — episode teasers, behind-the-scenes, subscriber testimonials

Drive traffic to 
 through organic and paid channels

Track and report on Vault subscriber growth and churn

Research competitor platforms and promotional strategies in the audio drama / vertical drama space

Think globally — this brand is not limited to the US. Marketing should consider international audiences, especially across the African diaspora and UK markets



BRAND VOICE GUIDE

This is the most important section. If you get everything else right but miss the voice, it doesn’t work.

WE ARE

WE ARE NOT

Raw, unfiltered, cinematic

Generic empowerment quotes

Editorial and specific

Church-lady inspiration

Gut-punch openers that stop the scroll

Fluffy, safe, forgettable

Real emotions from real moments

Corny motivational poster energy

Electric — always leave them wanting more

Long-winded, over-explaining

Provocative and unapologetic

Performatively edgy



Voice Examples:

GOOD: "You’ve been functioning. Not living."

GOOD: "She didn’t leave because she was strong. She left because she was tired of pretending weakness was peace."

BAD: "You are enough! Believe in yourself and shine your light!"

BAD: "Empowered women empower women! Rise queen!"

ACCESS & SECURITY RULES

You will be given limited access through shared workspaces and management tools — NOT personal logins

Canva: Team workspace access only. You will not have access to the account owner’s personal files

WordPress: Shop Manager role (not Administrator). You can manage products, pages, and content — not settings or plugins

Social Media: Access through a social management tool (Buffer, Later, or Metricool) — not direct login credentials

MailerLite: Shared login with limited permissions (no billing access)

Passwords shared via LastPass or 1Password — never via text,
, or chat

You will NEVER have access to: Stripe financial details, bank accounts, personal
, tax documents, or legal contracts

All work product created for this brand belongs to DADC SPARKS LLC

HOW WE WORK

Rhythm

Details

Sunday Night

D.A. approves weekly content calendar and drops raw content (voice memos, video clips, story ideas)

Monday–Friday

VA executes: posting, engaging, designing, reporting. D.A. is at her day job 8AM–6PM EST — do not expect real-time responses during these hours.

Daily Check-in

VA sends a 2-3 sentence end-of-day update via task management tool. What got done, what’s pending, anything urgent.

Weekly Report

Friday: VA delivers a performance summary — sales numbers, subscriber growth, engagement metrics, ad performance, and recommendations.

Communication

Task management tool (Trello/Notion/Asana) is the single source of truth. No scattered DMs or texts.

title: Product Sourcing Specialist (Dropshipping)
description:
BrandFi Inc. is looking for a detail-oriented Product Sourcing Specialist who can identify profitable products and reliable suppliers for our dropshipping operations.



This role requires strong research ability, supplier negotiation skills, and a deep understanding of pricing, shipping logistics, and product quality.



We are not looking for someone who simply searches AliExpress. We need someone who understands how to find high-margin products, negotiate supplier pricing, and manage shipping efficiency.



?



Role Overview



The Product Sourcing Specialist will be responsible for finding products that can be sold profitably while maintaining strong supplier relationships and reliable shipping timelines.



You will identify suppliers, compare pricing across multiple platforms, negotiate costs when possible, and ensure shipping reliability.



The goal is to maintain high margins while ensuring product quality and fulfillment reliability.



?



Key Responsibilities



Product Research & Sourcing



• Identify profitable products based on market demand and competition

• Source products from reliable suppliers

• Compare supplier pricing across multiple platforms

• Ensure product quality and supplier reliability



Supplier & Price Optimization



• Negotiate product pricing where possible

• Identify suppliers offering the best wholesale rates

• Monitor product cost changes and adjust sourcing strategy



Shipping & Fulfillment Management



• Identify suppliers with reliable shipping times

• Evaluate fulfillment options (AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping, private suppliers, etc.)

• Ensure shipping timelines meet customer expectations



Product Validation



• Evaluate product quality and supplier ratings

• Verify supplier reliability and fulfillment capability

• Check order processing times and return policies



Cost & Margin Analysis



• Ensure products maintain healthy profit margins

• Factor in product cost, shipping cost, and platform fees

• Recommend pricing strategies to maintain competitiveness



?



Daily Responsibilities



• Research and identify new product opportunities

• Compare supplier pricing and shipping options

• Build product sourcing lists with cost breakdowns

• Verify supplier reliability and fulfillment speed

• Maintain organized sourcing spreadsheets and supplier databases



?



Required Skills & Experience



• Experience with dropshipping product sourcing

• Strong supplier research skills

• Experience evaluating product margins

• Understanding of shipping logistics and fulfillment timelines

• Ability to identify reliable suppliers and avoid low-quality vendors

• Strong attention to detail



?



Preferred Experience



• Experience with Shopify stores

• Experience sourcing from AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping, or private suppliers

• Experience negotiating supplier pricing

• Understanding of product trend analysis



?



Work Style Expectations



• Highly detail-oriented

• Research-driven and analytical

• Comfortable comparing suppliers and negotiating pricing

• Process-driven and organized



?



Important Notes



• This role requires real research and supplier evaluation

• We prioritize quality suppliers and strong margins

• Candidates must be comfortable performing detailed product analysis

title: Online ESL Teacher
description:
1. Position Introduction



Salary and Benefits:

• Per hour : $2 – $4

• Trial class (first class with a student): $0.5 (regular salary applies for subsequent classes)



Bonus:



• $5 extra bonus for full attendance



• Additional bonus of $15 – $45 and paid leave for excellent teachers



Teaching Content:

Business English, daily conversation, kids’ English enlightenment, and adult oral English.



Students:

Students are mainly aged 3–18.



Teaching Mode:

One-on-one classes, 25 minutes per class.



Working Hours (China Time, UTC+8):

Part-time or full-time available. Working hours: 13:00–23:00.



• Part-time: 4 hours between 18:00–23:00 (peak teaching hours in China)

• Full-time: 8 hours per day, including 4 hours during peak hours, the remaining 4 hours can be flexibly arranged.



Difference between Part-time and Full-time:

• Part-time teachers: required to work 4 hours during the specified peak period.

• Full-time teachers: 8 hours per day, 4 hours during peak hours, the other 4 hours can be arranged flexibly.



All completed classes will be paid accordingly. We will arrange classes based on your available time, so you don’t need to worry about scheduling.



2. Position Advantages



Stable income, flexible working hours, remote work, schedule adaptable to your needs, stable student source, high booking volume, and course materials provided (no need to prepare teaching materials by yourself).

title: Recruiter – Appointment Setter Recruiting
description:
Recruiter – Appointment Setter Recruiting



Remote | Long-Term Role | Bonuses



We are hiring a recruiter to help us find and screen appointment setters for our team.



You will help us find strong candidates for an outbound calling role. These appointment setters speak with US business owners and either transfer live calls or book appointments for our closer.



We are looking for someone who is organized, detail-oriented, fast, and good at spotting strong phone talent.



Responsibilities



• Post and manage job ads  

• Review applications  

• Follow up with candidates  

• Request and review voice samples  

• Screen for spoken English, confidence, and professionalism  

• Shortlist qualified candidates  

• Help schedule interviews  

• Track candidate status from application to hire  

• Continuously find new candidates as we grow



Team Environment



You will be working alongside another recruiter as part of a small recruiting team. We want people who are collaborative, not territorial. Sharing sourcing ideas, helping each other, and working toward the same hiring goals is encouraged. We believe teamwork creates better results.



Where You May Source Candidates



• OnlineJobs.ph  

•
 groups  

• Referrals  

• Other recruiting channels you already know how to use



Requirements



• Recruiting, sourcing, or hiring experience preferred  

• Strong written English  

• Organized and dependable  

• Able to work independently  

• Fast communicator  

• Good judgment when evaluating people  

• Bonus if you already know how to find candidates through
 groups, OnlineJobs.ph, and other recruiting channels  

• Bonus if you have experience hiring for call center, BPO, appointment setting, or outbound sales roles, or have worked in a BPO or call center environment yourself



Pay



• $4/hour base  

• $20 per new hire who officially starts  

• Additional $5 if that hire remains active for 30 days



Officially starts means the hire completes onboarding and begins working.



To apply, send:



1. A short introduction  

2. Your recruiting or hiring experience  

3. The types of roles you have hired for  

4. Where you usually find candidates  

5. Your internet speed  

6. Your available working hours  

7. A 60–90 second audio introducing yourself, your recruiting experience, and how you would find strong appointment setters



Please put RECRUITER at the top of your application.



Learn more about us at

title: Credit Repair / Credit Building Specialist.
description:
Job Description



We are looking for an experienced Credit Repair Specialist to help improve credit scores by reviewing credit reports, identifying errors, disputing inaccurate items, and creating a credit-building strategy.



The ideal candidate has experience working with U.S. credit bureaus and understands how to build and repair personal credit effectively.



Responsibilities

Review credit reports (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)

Identify negative or inaccurate items affecting credit score

Submit disputes to credit bureaus and creditors

Track dispute progress and follow up regularly

Create a credit-building plan (secured cards, credit utilization strategy, etc.)

Provide guidance on improving credit score over time

Maintain organized records of all disputes and updates

Communicate progress weekly



Requirements



Proven experience in credit repair and credit building

Strong knowledge of U.S. credit laws (FCRA, FDCPA is a plus)

Experience submitting disputes and handling bureau responses

Organized and detail-oriented

Good communication skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Preferred Skills (Bonus)

Experience with Credit Repair Cloud or similar software

Experience working with clients in the U.S.

Knowledge of business credit building

Pay



Hourly or fixed-rate (negotiable based on experience)



To Apply



Please send:



Your credit repair experience

Examples of results you’ve achieved (score improvements, dispute removals, etc.)

Tools/software you have used

Your expected hourly rate



Use the link:

title: Website Manager (WordPress / SEO / Content) - 16-24h P/W -
description:
About Brightways



We help brands grow on marketplaces like Amazon and 
.



We are not a standard agency. We act as a business partner.

Clear strategy, strong execution, real results.



Our website (brightways dot nl) should reflect that. More than it does now.



--



The role



We are looking for someone who takes ownership of our website.



Not a developer. Not a designer.

Someone who improves, builds and structures pages using our existing CMS (WordPress, custom setup).



You will:

- Build and improve pages using available content blocks

- Improve structure, clarity and navigation

- Optimize pages for SEO and conversion

- Expand the website with new pages

- Help launch and maintain the English version of the site



You work closely with our team and design team, but you are responsible for sprint planning execution.



--



Multilingual content (NL ? EN)



Our website is currently only available in Dutch.

You will help expand and maintain the English version.



This means:

- Translating and rewriting pages from Dutch to English

- Making sure the tone of voice stays consistent

- Improving content instead of translating it literally

- Using AI as a tool, not as the final result

- Aligning with our team to get the content right



--



Growth opportunity (Social)



In a later stage, there is an opportunity to expand your role.



This includes:

- Supporting in setting up and improving our social content

- Repurposing website content into social posts

- Helping structure and scale our content output



This is not the core of the role now, but it can become part of your responsibility if you perform well.



-- 



Requirements:

- Strong experience with WordPress (custom CMS or page builders)

- Solid understanding of SEO (on-page, structure, internal linking)

- Ability to structure content clearly and logically

- Experience improving websites, not just maintaining them

- Comfortable working with AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.)

- Good written English

- Able to work independently and take ownership



--



Important



This is not a developer role.

This is not a basic VA role.



We are looking for someone who thinks in structure, clarity and growth.



--



How we work:

- You are proactive and used to work in clear sprints

- You take ownership of your work

- You communicate clearly and directly

- You focus on output, not activity



--



Application task (required)



We want to understand how you think and work.



Create a short plan (max 1 page) answering:



How would you approach improving and expanding our website (
), including adding an English version?



Your plan should include:

- First steps you would take

- How you prioritize what to improve first

- How you would handle NL ? EN content

- How you would improve SEO and structure

- How you would work in sprints



Keep it practical. No generic answers.



--



What we look for



We don’t care about long resumes.



We look for:

- Clear thinking

- Ownership

- Practical execution

- Attention to detail



If your answers are generic, we won’t move forward.



--



Video requirement (mandatory)



To be considered, you must include a short video (max 2 minutes).



In this video:

- Show that you have reviewed our website (
)

- Share your first impression

- Mention 2–3 concrete things you would improve



No generic introductions. We want to see how you think.



Applications without video will not be reviewed.

title: Short-Form Video + Social Media
description:
Part-Time VA — Short-Form Video + Social Media (2 Projects)



I started two new small websites and need a part-time VA to handle weekly content creation and social media for both. This is an ongoing role, roughly 5 hours/week.



The Projects:




 — tracks public market predictions made by well-known financial commentators.


 — a free online coloring page website.



Weekly Tasks



TASK #1: ForecastCard — Prediction Reel (~2 hrs)

Create ~90 second compliations of a person's predictions and results. 

Format: vertical reel (9:16 for TikTok / Reels / Shorts).



I provide:



All source clips. Example: 



A manifest with each prediction, date made, and outcome. You can also find it in the above link.



You handle:



- Trimming the clips

- Adding captions/subtitles, outcome and score graphics, music and sound, effects.

- Posting to TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts



TASK #2: ColoringBreak — Coloring Page Video (~2 hrs)

Pick one page from 
 and create a short coloring video. The video should include both formats below, cutting between them or back to back:



Screen recording — color the page directly in the browser on the site

Paper recording — print the page and film yourself coloring it by hand (phone camera is fine, no special equipment needed).

Light edit, add background music, keep it under 60 seconds. Post to socials once per week.



TASK #3: Community Engagement (~1 hrs)

Genuine participation in relevant Reddit and
 groups (coloring, mindfulness, personal finance/investing). Be helpful first — only mention the sites when it's very natural and relevant.



Paid Trial Projects: Before hiring, I'd like to offer a paid test task covering both sites:



ForecastCard reel — Create the reel using the dropbox source clips above. $20.00 USD.



ColoringBreak reel — Pick any page from 
 and record yourself coloring it — either a screen recording directly on the site, or print it out and film yourself coloring it by hand. Light edit, add background music, keep it under 60 seconds. $20.00 USD.



What I'm Looking For:



- Comfortable with basic video editing

- Experience posting to Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts

- Strong written and spoken English



Details



- Rate: $12/hr depending on experience 

- Hours: ~5 hrs/week, ongoing

- Schedule: Flexible — just needs to be posted once per week per task



To apply: Share some creative work. Examples of short-form video content would be great but anything that shows your creativity will be considered.

title: Social Media VA - DM Setter
description:
We are a fast-growing online fitness coaching business helping clients transform their bodies and lives through personalised programming and coaching support. We are looking for a highly motivated, people-focused Instagram DM Setter to join our team.



Your primary mission is simple: start real conversations with our new followers, build rapport, understand their goals, and book qualified sales calls with our coach. You will be the first touchpoint for potential clients — your energy and communication style directly impacts our growth.



Daily DM Outreach

Proactively message 100–150 new followers every day using our approved conversation scripts

Warm up cold leads with genuine, value-first conversations

Qualify prospects by understanding their fitness goals, struggles, and timeline

Transition qualified leads to book a strategy/sales call with the coach



Lead Management

Track all conversations and lead statuses in our CRM or tracking sheet

Follow up with warm leads who have not yet booked a call

Flag unresponsive or unqualified leads and remove from active pipeline

Maintain a clean, organised DM pipeline at all times



Profile & Follower Growth Support

Engage authentically with story replies, comments, and reactions to increase visibility

Support follower growth efforts alongside paid follower ads (target: 200–300 new followers/day)

Identify high-intent followers based on engagement patterns



Reporting & Communication

Submit a daily end-of-shift report with: conversations started, calls booked, leads in pipeline

Flag any issues with scripts, objections, or unusual lead behaviour to the coach

Attend brief weekly check-in call with coach to review performance and adjust approach



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

Must-Haves

Excellent written English — professional, warm, and conversational tone

Prior experience as an IG DM Setter or appointment setter (minimum 3 months)

Comfortable with high-volume outreach (100+ DMs per day)

Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace

Highly organised, self-motivated, and able to work with minimal supervision

Familiarity with Instagram and how the algorithm/DM system works



Nice-to-Haves

Background in fitness, health, or wellness (personal or professional)

Experience with GoHighLevel, Notion, or CRM tools

Understanding of basic sales psychology and objection handling

Previous work with a coaching business or personal brand





 HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered for this role, please send the following to [INSERT
 / IG HANDLE]:



A short video introduction (60–90 seconds) — tell us about yourself and why you are a great fit

Your CV / resume with relevant experience highlighted

A sample of a DM conversation you have started (screenshot welcome)

Your availability and preferred shift hours (Philippine time)

Subject line / DM opener: “I am your next setter — [YOUR NAME]”



Applications without a video introduction will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor — Screen Recording Assembly (Part-Time / Contract)
description:

For this project:



Review raw screen recordings

Cut, trim, and arrange clips into a coherent final video

Remove mistakes, pauses, and dead air

Deliver clean exports ready to publish





This project needs:



No animations

No B-roll

No motion graphics

No color grading

No thumbnail design

Just clean assembly editing. If you can cut clips together and make them flow, you're qualified.



What We're Looking For:



You can work in DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, CapCut, or Final Cut

You have a sharp eye for what to cut and what to keep

You can turn around edits quickly (24-48 hours)

You follow simple instructions without overcomplicating things

Reliable communication — you respond within a few hours, not a few days



Growth Path:



Start here. Prove you can deliver clean, on-time edits consistently. There will be opportunities to take on bigger projects if your work is up to par — full YouTube videos, animations, multi-camera edits, and more complex post-production work.



Your reliability and attention to detail in this role is what earns you the bigger projects.

1. 1-2 samples of editing work (even personal projects are fine)

2. A short summary of why you'd be a good fit

title: Data Extraction and Automation Specialist
description:
Company Overview



We are seeking a skilled Data Extraction and Automation Specialist who understands modern web scraping, lead data enrichment, automation workflows, and structured data management. Availability during U.S. Eastern hours is required.



Position Overview



We are hiring a Web Scraping and Lead Data Automation Specialist to support advanced list building, structured data extraction, and enrichment workflows. This role focuses on pulling targeted lead data at scale using Apify, Python, Clay, and APIs.



This is a hands on technical role for someone who understands scraping logic, selectors, pagination, anti-bot challenges, deduplication, and data normalization.



Key Responsibilities



• Build and maintain lead scraping workflows using Apify actors or Python

• Extract structured data from websites, directories, databases, and public sources

• Handle pagination, login flows, rate limits, and anti-scraping mechanisms

• Clean, dedupe, and normalize datasets

• Enrich scraped data using Clay

• Connect scraped and enriched data to CRM systems, Google Sheets, or CSV exports

• Build or integrate APIs for data transfer when needed

• Document scraping workflows and error handling processes

• Monitor automation health and troubleshoot broken workflows

• Deliver clean, structured lead lists ready for outbound campaigns



Qualifications



• Proven experience with web scraping using Apify or Python

• Strong understanding of HTML, CSS selectors, DOM structure

• Experience handling structured data formats such as JSON, CSV, and Excel

• Familiarity with REST APIs and authentication methods

• Experience using Clay for data enrichment

• Ability to troubleshoot scraping failures and adjust extraction logic

• Strong organizational skills and documentation habits

• Availability during U.S. Eastern hours



Preferred Skills



• Experience scraping education, healthcare, legal, or local business databases

• Familiarity with n8n, Zapier, or Make

• Experience integrating scraped data into Instantly, Apollo, Go High Level, or other CRMs

• Understanding of proxy management and anti-bot mitigation



Compensation



Pay is negotiable based on experience and technical depth.



Application Process



To apply for this position, candidates MUST complete all of the following steps:

 1. Submit a resume outlining web scraping and automation experience.

 2. Upload examples or screenshots of previous scraping projects or data extraction workflows.

 3. Submit a newly recorded video introduction where you:

• State the current date

• Explain your experience with web scraping, Apify, Python, and Clay

• Describe a scraping workflow you built and how you handled errors or blocked requests



Important Application Instructions



• Applications must be submitted through this link: 
/4130RpL

• Applications submitted directly on other platforms will not be reviewed

• All steps must be completed to be considered

This is an execution role with clear SLAs. You will work in ClickUp, follow workflows, publish consistently, and report weekly. You will also repurpose SEO blogs into newsletters and social assets.



Hours (UK time)



10 hours/week to start, with fixed daily cover windows required.

Hours are expected to increase over the next 2–3 months if performance is strong.



Pay



Base: $4/hr

Performance add-ons available (based on outputs, reliability, KPIs, and growth metrics)



Non-Negotiables

 • ClickUp is the source of truth (no WhatsApp-only working)

 • Weekly output targets and reporting are mandatory

 • Clear communication and reliability are essential



Core Responsibilities

 1. Content execution + scheduling



 • Build and maintain a weekly content plan

 • Schedule and publish posts across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn (and other platforms as assigned)

 • Keep a clean content calendar with deadlines and approvals



 2. Community management + engagement



 • Respond to comments and DMs within agreed response windows

 • Use templates/SOPs to follow up leads and move them to booking/enquiry steps



 3. Meta Ads support (important)



 • Set up and manage basic Meta campaigns (lead form + traffic + retargeting) OR support and coordinate ads delivery if you are not fully advanced

 • Track spend, leads, CPL, and outcomes

 • Report performance weekly with clear next steps



 4. Repurposing workflow (important)



 • Convert approved SEO blogs into:

 • newsletters 
 format)

 • carousels (6–10 slides)

 • short captions and posts

 • Follow our templates and workflow (brief ? draft ? approval ? schedule ? report)



 5. Weekly reporting



 • Submit a weekly report every Friday (what shipped + metrics + what’s next)



SLAs (must agree)

 • ClickUp updates: every assigned task must have “Next step + ETA” (no reactions-only updates)

 • Response time: acknowledge messages within 24 hours on working days (within cover windows faster)

 • Weekly deliverables:

 • content plan posted in ClickUp by Monday 12pm UK

 • minimum 5-10 posts scheduled/published per week (platform split agreed)

 • engagement log updated

 • weekly report by Friday 5pm UK



Tools you must use

 • ClickUp (task management)

 • Google Drive (assets/SOPs)

 • Meta Business Suite

Bonus: Canva, Mailchimp/Klaviyo (or similar), basic analytics



Application Instructions (important)



Start your application with the word: Workflow



Include:

 1. Confirmation you accept $4/hr base + performance add-ons

 2. Your fixed weekly availability in UK time (must include daily cover windows)

 3. Two examples of accounts/content you managed (links)

 4. Meta Ads experience: Yes/No. If yes, include results (spend, leads, CPL, ROAS if applicable)



Answer these 3 questions:

A) How would you turn an SEO blog into (1) a newsletter and (2) a 6-slide carousel?

B) What does your weekly report include (exact headings)?

C) Confirm you will work in ClickUp and follow SLAs (Yes/No)



Applications without “Workflow” will not be considered.
