title: Amazon Ecommerce Director Operations Manager and PPC
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based eCommerce brand looking for a dedicated, full-time Amazon & eCommerce Operations Manager / Director to work directly with the Founder and lead the entire operations team.



This is a long-term, exclusive position for serious applicants with proven leadership skills who want to grow with a stable company and take pride in their work.

Applicants managing other clients or side projects will not be considered.



The right candidate will manage day-to-day operations across multiple platforms — Amazon, Walmart, eBay, Shopify, TikTok Shop,
/Instagram Shops, and Google Merchant Center.

You’ll oversee product launches, logistics, PPC, inventory, team coordination, and process development while maintaining the highest standards of professionalism, accuracy, and communication.





Responsibilities

• Manage Amazon Seller Central operations (FBA shipments, listings, performance issues, returns, etc.).

• Oversee accounts on Walmart, eBay, TikTok Shop, and Shopify for consistency, optimization, and compliance.

• Coordinate freelancers and specialists (designers, developers, SMM managers, PPC managers, SEO/catalog specialists, VAs, and customer support).

• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and supervising remote tea
mbers.

• Create and maintain SOPs, ClickUp task systems, and structured project workflows.

• Plan and execute product launches, pricing strategies, and marketing promotions.

• Collaborate with the graphics team to produce Amazon Posts, A+/A++ content, sponsored videos, and seasonal creatives.

• Oversee logistics, labeling, and supplier coordination for shipping and compliance.

• Monitor and optimize PPC campaigns; analyze ACOS, ROAS, and keyword performance.

• Ensure professional, transparent communication — report issues immediately and propose solutions.

• Submit daily EOD reports, weekly KPI summaries, and maintain internal dashboards.

• Maintain strict confidentiality of all brand data, credentials, and strategies.







Requirements

• Minimum 4 years of hands-on Amazon Seller Central management and 2 years of social-media management (organic + paid) experience.

• Experience managing Walmart, eBay, TikTok Shop, and Shopify stores.

• Strong leadership and project-management skills.

• Excellent written and spoken English.

• Experience with Google Ads or Meta/TikTok marketing is a plus.

• Proficient with Helium10, ClickUp, TimeDoctor, Google Drive, and WhatsApp.

• Highly organized, proactive, and results-driven.

• Able to follow chain of command and seek approval for high-impact decisions.

• Honest, dependable, and calm under pressure.

• Willing to work extended hours when deadlines or launches require it.

• Must sign an NDA and complete a trial onboarding period.







Performance Expectations

• This role is measured by results — not hours worked.

• You must demonstrate ownership, accountability, and initiative.

• Failure to communicate delays or mistakes is considered non-performance.

• Performance will be reviewed at 30, 60, and 90 days, then periodically.

• Consistent, proactive communication and reporting are mandatory.

• Maintain active communication on WhatsApp and respond within 10 minutes during working hours.







Tools You’ll Use



Amazon Seller Central

Helium10 / DataHawk / SmartScout / Keepa

ClickUp (Project Management)

Google Drive / Sheets / Docs

TimeDoctor (Time Tracking)

WhatsApp & Slack 



Please attach your Resume,
 and WhatsApp number

title: Amazon A+ Premium Content Graphic Designer, Web Designer
description:
We are looking for a talented and creative Graphic Designer to join our team. The ideal candidate will create visually compelling designs that effectively communicate our brand’s message across digital and print platforms. You should have a strong eye for detail, solid creative skills, and the ability to turn concepts into engaging visuals.



Key Responsibilities



- Design high-quality Amazon product images including hero images, infographics, lifestyle photos, and comparison charts.

- Create Amazon A+ Content and Storefront graphics aligned with brand guidelines.

- Ensure designs comply with Amazon image requirements (dimensions, white background, clarity, etc.).

- Collaborate with the marketing, content, and product development teams to understand product features and selling points.

- Edit and retouch raw product photos for better visual appeal.

- Develop packaging, labels, and other branding materials when needed.

- Maintain an organized workflow and deliver outputs within deadlines.

- Conduct research on competitor listings to help improve design strategy.

- Stay updated with Amazon trends, shopper behavior, and best practices for product listing optimization.

- Having your own repository for stock images is a plus.

- Be responsive to urgent messages and communication during work hours.

- Work efficiently—fast, high-quality output is rewarded.



Requirements



- Proven experience as a Graphic Designer, preferably with Amazon or e-commerce experience.

- Strong portfolio showcasing Amazon product images or similar design work.

- Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and Canva.

- Basic knowledge of product photography or photo editing is a plus.

- Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and understanding of visual hierarchy.

- Ability to work efficiently, follow instructions accurately, and adapt to revisions.

- Strong time-management and organizational skills.

- Availability for 30–40 hours per week.



Salary & Compensation



Monthly Salary: PHP 40,000

Performance-Based Bonuses:

-->Bonus for number of images or design outputs created

-->Speed and turnaround time bonuses

-->Quality-of-work and performance bonuses

-->Bonus for accuracy, creativity, and strong understanding of instructions and brand guidelines



Additional Note

We’re serious about hiring. This is a real job opening.

title: HR and Operations Manager (Amazon and eCommerce Focus)
description:
Overview



We are a U.S.-based Amazon & eCommerce company looking for a senior-level HR & Operations Manager to take full ownership of people, processes, payroll, and internal operations.



This is not a junior HR role and not a training position. You must already know how to manage remote teams, enforce accountability, and document systems without hand-holding.





Core Responsibilities

 • End-to-end hiring, interviewing, onboarding, and termination

 • Payroll management and coordination with accounting

 • Enforce schedules, performance standards, and company policies

 • Create, document, and maintain SOPs for every recurring task

 • Store and organize SOPs (Notion / ClickUp / Drive)

 • Coordinate Amazon & eCommerce teams (Amazon Seller Central familiarity required)

 • Daily reporting and direct coordination with the Founder





Required (Non-Negotiable)

 • Amazon Seller Central experience

 • Prior experience in HR, Operations, or Team Management

 • Proven experience handling payroll

 • Strong English communication

 • Comfortable hiring, firing, and enforcing rules

 • Highly organized and process-driven

 • Able to work with U.S. time overlap



Do not apply if you need training

Do not apply if you avoid confrontation or accountability





Compensation



100,000PHP/month

Performance-based raises and long-term growth available for top performers.



Application Instructions (Required)



To be considered, include:

 1. Your Amazon & eCommerce experience

 2. Your HR/Operations background

 3. Examples of SOPs or systems you’ve built

 4. Confirmation you are comfortable with hiring, firing, payroll, and enforcement

 5. Your availability for U.S. time overlap



Applications that do not follow instructions will be ignored.

title: Competitor research
description:
We are hiring a Competitor Research Specialist for women’s fashion dropshipping stores.



We are looking for someone who can do serious daily competitor research for us in the following markets:

USA

Canada

United Kingdom

Germany



This is not research for big brands or established fashion companies.

We are only looking for real e-commerce dropshipping stores in women’s fashion.



Important:

Do not send competitors like Zara, H&M, Gymshark, or other large brands.

We only want actual dropshippers.

These are usually newer stores that have only been active for a few months.

You should be able to recognize real dropshipping stores by the way the website looks, the product range, the store structure, and by using tools like PPSpy to confirm the store type and origin.



Your job:

You will search for women’s fashion dropshipping competitors in the Meta Ad Library and collect strong competitors in each market.



Requirements for every competitor:

 • Must be a real dropshipping store

 • Must be in women’s fashion

 • Must have at least 100 active ads

 • Must have at least 2,
 likes

 • Must have at least 1,000 products on the website

 • Must have existed for at least 1 month

 • Must not be a big brand or established company



Extra requirement for the UK and Germany:

When researching these markets, you must also check campaign reach in the Meta Ad Library.

Reach is important for these countries, so we want to see how strong their best-performing campaigns are.



What you need to deliver:

You must find 5 competitors per market for:

 • USA

 • Canada

 • United Kingdom

 • Germany



You must send everything in a sheet.



For each competitor, include:

 • Competitor/store name

 • Country

 • Date found

 • Number of active ads

 • Number of
 likes

 • Estimated number of products on the website

 • Best-performing campaign reach (for UK and Germany where visible)

 • Ad Library link

 • Website link



Important:

We only want real dropshipping competitors.

Do not send branded stores, large companies, or famous fashion brands.

We need stores that are clearly operating as dropshipping businesses.



What we are looking for:

We want someone who can do this every day, consistently and seriously.

Not someone who works one day and disappears the next.

This is a long-term position.

You must be organized, reliable, and comfortable working with Meta Ad Library and Google Sheets.



Once you start working with us, you will receive our research sheet where everything can be noted clearly and properly.



We are looking for someone who understands this type of research and can find high-quality competitors that actually match our criteria.



If the work is good and the company grows, you will be rewarded well.

When the business grows, you grow with us.



Only apply if:

 • You understand dropshipping

 • You know how to identify real fashion dropshippers

 • You can do proper competitor research daily

 • You are accurate with Sheets

 • You can follow instructions carefully



When applying, send a sample sheet or sample competitors that match the requirements above.

We will only respond to serious applicants who clearly understand what kind of competitors we are looking for.

title: Video Editor (Face Blur & Cropping for Content)
description:
We are looking for a reliable video editor to help process a high volume of short videos.



The core task is simple but requires attention to detail:

 • Blur or crop faces so the person is completely unidentifiable

 • Ensure clean, professional output with no loss of quality



This is an ongoing role with consistent work. If you perform well, there will be opportunities to take on more advanced editing and content tasks over time.



Responsibilities

 • Blur or crop faces in videos so identity is fully hidden at all times

 • Track face movement when required (not just static blur)

 • Maintain original video quality (no compression or distortion)

 • Export videos in the correct format and resolution

 • Organize and upload completed files to shared folders



Requirements

 • Experience with video editing software (Premiere Pro, CapCut or similar)

 • Ability to accurately track moving subjects in video

 • Strong attention to detail (no missed frames or visibility errors)

 • Fast turnaround and good communication

 • Reliable internet connection



Important

This role requires precision. If the face is visible at any point, the edit is not acceptable.



Test Task (Required to Apply)

To be considered, you must complete a short paid test:

 • You will be given 1 sample video

 • You must blur or crop the face correctly

 • Submit the final exported file



Compensation

 • Paid per video (rate discussed after test task)

 • Ongoing work available for the right candidate

 • Opportunity to increase earnings by taking on more responsibilities over time



How to Apply

 1. Briefly describe your experience with video editing

 2. List the software you use

 3. Confirm you are comfortable with face tracking and blurring

 4. Include the word editor-ready in your application (to confirm you read this)

title: Collections Manager
description:
WFH

Graveyard Shift

1 year contract



Position Overview



Job Description

The Collections Manager is responsible for overseeing the accounts receivable collections process to ensure timely payment of invoices and maintain healthy cash flow. This role manages the collections team, monitors aging reports, resolves payment issues with clients, and works closely with accounting, billing, and operations teams to reduce outstanding receivables.



The Collections Manager will implement structured follow-up procedures, monitor collection performance metrics, and ensure accurate documentation of all collection activities.



Key Responsibilities:

Accounts Receivable & Collections Management

- Manage the full accounts receivable collections process for all client accounts.

-Monitor AR aging reports and identify overdue balances.

- Ensure consistent follow-up on past due invoices through
, phone calls, and formal notices.

- Prioritize high-value and high-risk accounts to reduce outstanding balances.

-  Work with clients to resolve billing disputes and payment issues.

- Negotiate payment plans when necessary.



Team Leadership

- Manage and supervise the collections team.

- Assign accounts and collection priorities.

- Train tea
mbers on collection procedures and systems.

- Monitor team performance and ensure collection targets are met.



Reporting & Analysis

- Produce weekly and monthly collections reports.

- Track KPIs such as:

          Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)

          Collection rate

          Aging trends

         Top delinquent accounts

- Present reports and updates to senior management.



Cross-Department Coordination

- Work closely with:

       Finance & Accounting

      Billing

      Sales

     Operations



- Ensure invoices are accurate and disputes are resolved quickly.

- Coordinate with accounting to apply payments correctly in QuickBooks.



Process Improvement

- Develop and implement improved collections procedures.

- Identify inefficiencies in billing or invoicing processes that delay payments.

- Implement automation and reporting tools where appropriate.



Compliance & Documentation

- Ensure all collection activity is properly documented.

- Maintain accurate client communication records.

- Ensure collection practices comply with company policies and applicable laws.



Qualifications

Experience

- 5+ years of experience in accounts receivable or collections.

- 2+ years managing a collections team preferred.

- Experience with large commercial accounts and high invoice volumes.



Technical Skills

- Experience with QuickBooks or similar accounting software.

- Strong knowledge of AR aging and collections strategies.

- Proficiency with Excel and financial reporting tools.



Soft Skills

- Strong negotiation and communication skills.

- High attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple priorities.

- Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- The Collections Manager will be evaluated based on:

- Reduction in Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)

- Monthly collections percentage

- Reduction of 90+ day receivables

- Resolution time for billing disputes

- Accuracy of AR reporting

- Team productivity and performance

title: Grant & Proposal Junior Assistant
description:
Grant & Proposal Junior Assistant (Part-Time, Long-Term)

Overview

I am the Principal of a small but growing consulting firm in the U.S. that helps innovative small businesses secure funding and contracts from government and commercial organizations. I am looking for a detail oriented Grant & Proposal Junior Assistant to support preparation, organization, and coordination for grant and proposal submissions (both government and commercial).

Type of Work

• Part-time

• 4–10 hours per week depending on business tempo (this will vary week to week)

• Long-term role with potential to grow in hours and responsibilities over time

Compensation

• Starting rate: 3.75 USD per hour

• First raise opportunity at 60 days based on performance

• Expect pay growth over time with excellent performance and increased responsibility

Key Responsibilities

• Read and interpret opportunity instructions, guidelines, and FAQs, ensuring all key requirements are captured accurately.

• Download and organize all documents (RFPs, templates, forms, rubrics, etc.) into clearly labeled folders and subfolders in shared online storage.

• Summarize requirements, eligibility, evaluation criteria, and submission steps into simple checklists or briefs for my review.

• Prepare draft outlines for proposals and applications using templates when available, aligned to instructions.

• Maintain a basic tracker for opportunities, tasks, and deadlines so we stay ahead of due dates.

• Support submission coordination when needed (e.g., confirming portal requirements, formats, registrations), while I remain responsible for final submission.

What This Role Is NOT

• You are not the lead or final grant or proposal writer.

• You are not responsible for final content decisions or final submissions.

What I Will Do as Principal

• Select opportunities and define overall proposal strategy.

• Provide templates, prior examples, and direction for each opportunity when available.

• Write and edit the final proposal or grant application.

• Coordinate with clients and manage final submission.

• Provide regular feedback and guidance so you can learn our processes and expectations over time.

Schedule & Communication

• No fixed daily schedule or time zone overlap required, but you must attend 1–2 short meetings per week (scheduled in advance) via Google Meet.

• Outside of meetings, you can work flexible hours as long as tasks are completed on time and deadlines are met.

• Use clear written communication, keep trackers updated, and provide status updates.

Minimum Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in any field (required).

• Excellent written English and strong reading comprehension.

• High attention to detail and a methodical approach to following instructions.

• Comfortable reading long and sometimes technical instructions without missing important details.

• Experience with online file storage and collaboration tools (e.g., Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive) and office tools (Docs, Sheets, Word, Excel).

• Ability to create and maintain simple spreadsheets, checklists, and calendars to track tasks and deadlines.

• Reliable internet connection and ability to manage, organize, and back up documents.

Ideal Candidate

• You are organized, reliable, and careful with details.

• You like turning complex instructions into clear steps and checklists.

• You are comfortable working independently, asking questions when something is unclear, and following simple SOPs or templates.

• You are looking for a stable, long term client relationship with room to grow your skills, responsibilities, and pay over time.

How to Apply

Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and include the following:

1. Explain why this role fits your skills (max 275 words). The last sentence in your cover letter should be “Yes, I follow detailed instructions well.”

2. Your updated resume/CV, including your degree.

3. Explain how this 4-10 hours per week fits into your current schedule.

4. Can you briefly describe your workspace setup? For example, do you have a dedicated, quiet space and a stable internet connection?

5. Confirm starting hourly rate.

title: Livestream Operations Manager (onsite at Parañaque)
description:
Dear Applicants,



## Livestream Operations Manager – We're Hiring! ##



**Please note that this is an onsite job at Parañaque**



We run live commerce operations across multiple countries and platforms, and we need an experienced Livestream Operations Manager to keep everything running smoothly. You'll manage session flow, lead and support the hosting team, onboard new livestreamers, and step on camera yourself when needed.



IMPORTANT: This role requires prior experience in both livestreaming and operations management. You must be confident on camera and equally confident running the show behind it.



Job Scope:

- Coordinate and manage livestream schedules across platforms and markets

- Ensure smooth execution of sessions — briefing hosts, monitoring quality, and troubleshooting in real time

- Sub in as a livestream host when needed

- Onboard and guide new livestreamers on workflows, platform tools, brand standards, and live selling techniques

- Monitor concurrent live streams and provide real-time support to hosts

- Track performance metrics and compile regular reports with insights

- Maintain and improve SOPs for all livestream operations

- Coordinate with marketing, content, and supply chain teams to align promotions and logistics



Requirements:

- Prior experience as a livestream host or live commerce presenter — confident and comfortable on camera

- Prior experience in livestream operations or e-commerce operations management

- Able to onboard and coach new livestreamers effectively

- Familiar with TikTok Shop, Shopee Live, or similar live selling platforms

- Strong organisational and multi-tasking skills

- Good written and spoken English

- Proactive and solutions-focused with a high sense of ownership



Note:

- Full-time basis – 6 hrs/day (with 1 hr break), 6 working days within a Monday–Sunday window

- Shifts are between 8am and 10pm (Philippine Standard Time) — specific schedule to be discussed

- 14 days of Paid Annual Leave and Paid Public Holidays (all major holidays in the Philippines) included



IMPORTANT: When applying, please provide:

- Your CV/Resume

- A short video introduction of yourself and why you think you're a good fit

- Why you are leaving your last job or what you were doing just before this application

- A portfolio or examples of previous livestream hosting and/or operations management work — this can include links to live sessions, screenshots of dashboards, SOPs, or team coordination work you've handled. Applications without demonstrated livestream experience will not be considered.



Applications without the above points will be less considered.



P.S. Please format your replies in point form according to the items asked above, e.g.:

• My resume is here:

• Video introduction here:

• Here are examples of my work...



The more information you provide in your initial application, the better.



Best regards,

Loo Yi

title: CUSTOMER SUCCESS MANAGER - HEALTHCARE SAAS PLATFORM
description:
CUSTOMER SUCCESS MANAGER - HEALTHCARE SAAS PLATFORM



We're a fast-growing US-based healthcare technology company seeking an experienced Customer Success Manager to lead client onboarding as we scale from pilot to national expansion.



ABOUT THE ROLE:

You'll be our first Customer Success hire, responsible for onboarding new healthcare clinics to our patient support platform. This role will grow significantly as we scale - starting with 5-10 clinics/month and expanding to 20-30+ clinics/month within 6-12 months as we go national.



GROWTH TRAJECTORY:

- Months 1-5: Onboard 5-10 clinics/month, build systems and training materials

- Months 6-12: Scale to 20-30+ clinics/month as volume increases, potential to lead a CS team

- This is a ground-floor opportunity with significant growth potential



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Onboard new healthcare clinics via live Zoom training sessions during US business hours

- Create scalable training materials (videos, guides, documentation, SOPs)

- Conduct platform demonstrations and walk-throughs

- Upload and manage client data (CSV files, spreadsheets)

- Troubleshoot technical issues and provide ongoing support

- Build repeatable onboarding processes that can scale

- Track success metrics (time-to-onboard, client satisfaction, adoption rates)

- Eventually train and manage additional CS tea
mbers as we grow



IDEAL CANDIDATE:

- 2+ years customer success, client onboarding, or training experience

- SaaS or BPO background (healthcare experience strongly preferred)

- Excellent English communication (written and verbal) - must be comfortable on video calls with US clients

- Tech-savvy: comfortable with Google Sheets, Zoom, CRM tools, screen sharing

- Process-oriented: able to document and systematize workflows for scale

- Growth mindset: excited to build something from the ground up

- Available to work US Eastern business hours (9am-5pm EST = 9pm-5am Manila time) for live client interactions

- Night shift experience preferred - this is a US time zone role



WHAT WE OFFER:

- Starting salary: $1,000-1,250/month USD (based on experience)

- US Eastern business hours schedule (9pm-5am Manila time) - ideal for night shift professionals

- Flexible schedule within US business hours based on client call availability

- Salary increases as you transition to full-time and as company scales

- Clear growth path: Senior CS Manager ? CS Team Lead ? Head of Customer Success

- Fully remote work - no commute required

- Work directly with founder and technical team

- Mission-driven US healthcare company improving patient outcomes

- Performance bonuses tied to client success metrics



COMPENSATION STRUCTURE:

We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us. As our client base scales over the next 18 months, your role and compensation can scale as well.

 

- Senior role consideration around Months 12-18 as you manage team/processes

- Performance bonuses tied to client retention and satisfaction metrics



TO APPLY:

Please include in your application:

1. Brief summary of your customer success/onboarding experience

2. Any healthcare or SaaS background you have

3. Confirm your availability for US Eastern business hours (9pm-5am Manila time)

4. Why you're interested in a ground-floor growth opportunity

5. Examples of processes or systems you've built at previous roles



We're hiring immediately for our launch. Apply today!
